title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
We are hiring for APK VISUALS, a YouTube media company producing and managing multiple faceless channels across TV, Animation, History, and News.



We’re currently looking for skilled Video Editors to create engaging long-form content across our network of channels.



This role is suited for editors who can work efficiently, follow direction, and consistently deliver high-quality videos.



Responsibilities:

• Edit long-form YouTube videos across a range of topics and styles

• Work with scripts, voiceovers, stock footage, music, and graphics to produce polished content

• Adjust pacing, structure, and visuals to match each channel’s style

• Collaborate with tea
mbers to ensure smooth production flow

• Meet deadlines and maintain consistent output quality

• Follow internal guidelines and workflows



Requirements (Flexible):

• Experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)

• Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

• Ability to adapt to different editing styles and formats

• Basic understanding of YouTube content and audience retention

• Organized, dependable, and able to follow detailed instructions

• Open to feedback and continuous improvement



Compensation:

Up to $750/month, depending on skill level, availability, and output quality.



Shortlisted applicants will be contacted via
, so please keep an eye on your inbox.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Specialist (CRM)
description:
Job Description:



We’re looking for a Klaviyo
 Marketing Specialist to manage and improve our
 marketing for an eCommerce brand.

This is a hands-on role focused on building flows, running campaigns, and improving performance over time.

If you’ve worked with Klaviyo (flows + campaigns) and want a long-term role where you can grow, we’d love to hear from you.



Role Details

Full-time (Mon–Fri, 9AM–5PM AEST)

Remote

Immediate start

$307/week (paid weekly)



What You’ll Do:

- Build and optimize Klaviyo flows (Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, Winback)

- Create and send
 campaigns + SMS campaigns

- Segment audiences and personalize messaging

- Run A/B tests (subject lines, timing, content)

- Track performance (open rate, CTR, revenue) and improve results

- Work with Shopify data to improve targeting



Must-Have:

- Hands-on experience with Klaviyo (flows + campaigns)

- Experience in
 marketing for eCommerce

- Familiar with Shopify, Google Sheets, Trello

- Basic understanding of segmentation and A/B testing



Nice to Have:

- SMS marketing experience

- Meta Ads understanding

- Looker Studio (optional)



To apply, please include:



1. Your most updated CV

2. A short summary of your Klaviyo experience

3. 1–2 results you’ve achieved (e.g. open rates, revenue, conversions)

4. Example of a flow or campaign you’ve built



Applications without this will not be considered.

title: Full Stack Web Developer & UI/UX Designer (WordPress / Shopify)
description:
Experience: 4+ years

Type: Part



How to apply:

Send us a link to your portfolio and 4-6 examples of WordPress and Shopify sites you've designed and built. Tell us briefly what your role was on each one, and also what are your skills most useful to us. We won't consider applications without a portfolio, so please don't skip that part.



About the role -

We're looking for a solid all-rounder, someone who's equally comfortable jumping into a design conversation as they are digging into code. You don't need to be the world's best at everything, but we do need someone who can wear a few hats and get things done without a lot of hand-holding.

We have live projects ready to go, including a Shopify CRO task and a WordPress website design and build, so if you can hit the ground running that's a big bonus. There's also potential for longer term ongoing work as things grow.



What you'll work on -

- A Shopify CRO task focused on improving conversion performance

- A WordPress website design and development project from concept through to launch

- Custom WordPress and Shopify builds, theme customisation, and performance work

- UI/UX design in Figma including wireframing and prototyping

- Responsive, mobile-friendly layouts built with conversions in mind

- Platform migrations (Magento to Shopify) and website redesigns

- The occasional project on Webflow, Wix, or Squarespace



What we're looking for -

- Solid WordPress experience with themes, plugins, page builders, the works

- Shopify development experience with Liquid templating, app integrations, and comfort working with data across platforms

- Good PHP and JavaScript skills

- Figma for UI/UX design work

- A basic to intermediate understanding of SEO including on-page optimisation, site structure, and page speed

- Familiarity with how ecommerce platforms are structured and how content and data maps between them

- Someone who can take a brief and run with it

- A portfolio of real websites you've actually built and shipped

- Good written English, we communicate a lot async so clarity matters



Nice to have

- Hands-on CRO experience with a bit of SEO experience.

- Experience handling ecommerce migrations including products, redirects, and preserving SEO value

- WooCommerce including payment and shipping setup

- A bit of experience on Webflow/Framer.

title: HubSpot Coordinator
description:
Description

Overview: This role focuses on driving the empowerment of the Sales Team and optimizing sales processes for increased productivity. The ideal candidate will be proficient in leveraging cutting-edge tools like HubSpot, Apollo, and Zapier to streamline operations and boost organizational efficiency. Expertise in enhancing CRM databases for effective Business Development Representative (BDR) outreach, while ensuring data accuracy and system optimization, is essential. A proven track record of streamlining sales processes and improving sales outcomes is a must.



Main Responsibilities:



Lead Enrichment & Data Management: Manage and optimize lead enrichment processes, including data management, system analysis, and ongoing lead quality checks.

HubSpot CRM Management: Oversee CRM management, including assisting with lead assignment and reassignment to the sales team, ensuring all records are up-to-date and relevant.

Lead Enrichment Research: Use Apollo and LinkedIn to research and enrich leads with relevant information to increase outreach success.

Data Quality & Cleanup: Monitor and maintain data quality, deduplicate records, and address inconsistencies in the CRM.

Reporting & Dashboards: Develop and maintain performance reports and dashboards to track key metrics and provide insights for the sales and marketing teams.

Tool Integration & Reporting: Integrate with sales tools such as RingCentral to ensure in-sync, accurate reporting across platforms.

Lead Scrubbing & Accuracy: Proactively crawl new leads and scrub them for accuracy and relevance.

Workflow Optimization: Identify inefficiencies in current HubSpot workflows, recommend, and implement process improvements.

Support & Ad-Hoc Analysis: Provide support for ad-hoc data analysis requests, task creation for BDRs, and lead follow-ups.

Cross-Department Collaboration: Work closely with sales, marketing, and operations teams to streamline communications and data handoffs.

Minor Responsibilities:



Facilitation & Communication: Participate in calibration sessions and meetings to ensure clear and effective communication across departments.

BDR Support: Maintain open communication with BDRs to address inquiries and provide ongoing support for lead-related activities.

Team Training & Development: Help train new tea
mbers, providing continuous guidance and support to ensure their long-term success.

KPI & Reporting: Report on KPIs, tools, and overall department performance to key stakeholders.

Requirements

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Business Management, Entrepreneurship, or other related fields.

Required Work Experience:



1-2 years of experience in lead generation, data management, or B2B sales.

At least 6 months of experience with CRM platforms, ideally HubSpot.

1-2 years in client success or end-to-end sales experience is preferred.

Hands-on experience with Zapier integration for sales workflows and automation.

Hard Skills:



Data Management: Proficiency in organizing and maintaining data.

System Analysis: Ability to analyze and optimize systems to improve lead enrichment and management processes.

CRM Management: Expertise in CRM management, particularly with HubSpot.

Lead Enrichment: Experience with enriching leads using tools like Apollo and LinkedIn.

Data Quality Assurance: Proactive approach to scrubbing and ensuring the accuracy of leads and CRM data.

Research Skills: Strong ability to gather and interpret relevant information for lead enrichment.

Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze data and draw actionable insights for decision-making.

Zapier Integration: Proficiency in using Zapier for automating workflows and integrating tools to improve team efficiency.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.



Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: Disposition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Disposition Manager (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners (U.S.-based Real Estate Investment Firm)

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time (48 hrs/week)

Start Date: Immediate

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions per Closed Deal + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment company specializing in buying off-market residential properties and selling them to a curated network of cash buyers and investors. We focus on transparency, speed, and results — offering sellers quick, fair deals and investors high-value opportunities.



As our Disposition Manager, you’ll be responsible for turning signed contracts into closed deals — marketing properties, managing buyer relationships, negotiating assignments, and coordinating closings.



Core Mission

Your mission is simple: turn inventory into cash by selling contracts quickly and profitably while maintaining strong relationships with our investor network.



Key Responsibilities



Property Marketing & Buyer Outreach

Launch new deals to buyers within hours of contract execution.

Market properties using
 campaigns, CRM blasts,
 groups, Craigslist, and other investor channels.

Create engaging property listings and buyer packets with all key details (ARV, comps, rehab estimates, pictures).



Buyer Relations & Negotiation

Build, grow, and maintain a strong network of cash buyers and investor partners.

Negotiate assignment fees and contract terms that maximize company profit.

Follow up daily with buyers through calls, texts, and
s to create urgency and close quickly.



Transaction Coordination

Coordinate with title companies, escrow officers, and attorneys to ensure smooth closings.

Track deal progress, resolve title or buyer issues, and maintain clear communication across all parties.

Ensure accurate, compliant documentation for each transaction.



Market Research & Feedback Loop

Run comps using PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, and ChatGPT tools.

Stay updated on local market conditions, investor trends, and pricing benchmarks.

Provide insights to the acquisitions team for better property selection and pricing strategy.



Reporting & CRM Management

Keep CRM updated with all buyer interactions, notes, and statuses.

Track KPIs: time-to-market, engagement, contracts assigned, and closing ratios.

Generate weekly disposition performance reports for management review.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli, Podio, or InvestorLift

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin

Communication: CallTools / BatchDialer / Google Workspace

Marketing:
/SMS tools, Canva, ChatGPT,
/Craigslist

Qualifications

title: Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:

About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties directly from homeowners. Our mission is to create win-win solutions — helping sellers achieve peace of mind while building strong, ethical real estate deals that create value for everyone involved.



We buy distressed, inherited, pre-foreclosure, vacant, or problem properties — always focusing on transparency, empathy, and integrity.



As an Acquisition Specialist, you are the first or second voice sellers hear from us — the bridge between their challenges and our solutions.



Your Mission



Your job is to connect with motivated sellers, uncover their real needs, and help negotiate win-win purchase agreements for our company.

You’ll represent Homeward Partners with professionalism, empathy, and drive — moving conversations from first contact to signed contracts.



Key Responsibilities



Seller Outreach & Communication

Call, text, and
 inbound/outbound seller leads.

Build rapport and trust through active listening, not pressure tactics.

Qualify sellers based on motivation, timeline, property condition, and financial situation.

Ask diagnostic questions to uncover challenges like inheritance, title issues, or foreclosure risks.



Deal Analysis & Negotiation

Evaluate property values using tools like PropStream, Zillow, or Redfin.

Analyze motivation and market data to make fair, strategic offers.

Negotiate purchase agreements that align with company goals while maintaining win-win outcomes for sellers.

Submit qualified deals to the Disposition Team with all relevant details and comps.



CRM & Follow-Up Management

Maintain consistent CRM updates for every seller conversation, note, and offer.

Schedule timely follow-ups for unconverted leads.

Track and report KPIs such as calls made, quality conversations, offers presented, and contracts signed.



Team Collaboration

Coordinate with the Disposition Team to ensure deal handoffs are smooth.

Share feedback and insights from sellers to improve marketing and acquisition targeting.

Participate in sales meetings, training sessions, and roleplays to sharpen skills.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli or Podio

Dialer: CallTools, Readymode, Mojo, BatchDialer

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, ChatGPT (for comps)

Communication: Google Workspace, Slack, WhatsApp

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI dashboards



Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in real estate acquisitions, cold calling, or high-volume sales.

Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written).

Strong negotiation and problem-solving skills with a focus on empathy.

Organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with CRM documentation.

Comfortable working full-time U.S. hours (Central or Eastern Time).

Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly.



Preferred Experience:

Prior experience talking to distressed or motivated sellers.

Understanding of real estate transactions, contracts, and title processes.

Familiarity with DISC personality profiles and rapport-based communication.



Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: Full Stack Developer: AI Platform
description:
Full Stack Developer for an AI Platform (Agent Orchestration + AI-Powered App Builder)

Remote | Full-Time | Long-Term



We're a media-tech company based in Sweden and Switzerland. We're building an AI-powered platform that lets non-technical operators in the iGaming space (online casino operators) to generate, iterate, and deploy branded web experiences through conversational AI. Think Lovable meets multi-agent orchestration, built for a specific vertical.



This isn't a website builder. It's an intelligent system where specialized AI agents collaborate to produce production-ready output, from brand identity to deployed pages, orchestrated through natural language.



We have the architecture designed, the core infrastructure partially built, and a clear technical vision. What we need is a developer who can take ownership of the build alongside our technical leadership and drive it forward daily.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY BE BUILDING

The platform runs on a multi-agent system where each agent has a specialized role (brand analysis, page generation, compliance scoring, deployment). Your work will span:

- Agent infrastructure: prompt assembly, tool-based mutation systems, streaming responses (SSE), and structured output parsing

- A React + Tailwind component system where AI agents compose pages from a typed component library, not freeform HTML

- Real-time preview pipeline: TSX compilation, iframe sandboxing, PostMessage bridges

- Deployment automation: compiling React output to static assets and pushing to hosting (Vercel)

- API layer: RESTful routes handling agent orchestration, page versioning, brand management, and multi-tenant org logic

- Database architecture: Supabase (Postgres), row-level security, immutable version history, encrypted storage



THE RIGHT PERSON: ONE LINE

You're not waiting for tickets, you're identifying what needs to happen, proposing how, and building it.



THE STACK

- Frontend: React, Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4

- Backend: Next.js API routes, Supabase (Postgres + Auth + RLS), Server-Sent Events

- AI: Anthropic Claude API (prompt engineering, streaming, tool use / function calling)

- Build pipeline: Sucrase/esbuild for TSX compilation, iFrame sandboxing

- Deployment: Vercel SDK for programmatic deployments

- Testing: Vitest (unit), Playwright (E2E)

- AI orchestration tools: Paperclip Ing, Inngest



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Must have:

- Strong TypeScript and React: you think in components, hooks, and typed interfaces

- Full-stack capability: you're equally comfortable writing API routes, database queries, and frontend UI

- Experience working with LLM APIs: you've built something that calls OpenAI, Claude, or similar (not just used ChatGPT)

- Systems thinking: when given a problem, you think about data flow, state management, and edge cases before writing code

- Self-direction: you can take a high-level objective ("build the page versioning system") and break it into tasks yourself



Strong advantage:

- Experience with AI agent systems, orchestration patterns, or multi-step AI workflows (Paperclip Ing, OpenClaw, etc)

- Familiarity with SSE/streaming, real-time UI updates

- Experience with Supabase or Postgres with row-level security

- Familiarity with Vercel deployment APIs

- Experience with component library design or design systems

- Startup mindset: you've shipped products, not just features



WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY

- If you need detailed step-by-step instructions for every task, this isn't the role

- If you've only worked with AI by using ChatGPT in a browser, this requires deeper technical integration

- If you can't work independently for extended stretches and proactively communicate blockers, this won't work

- If you only want to work on frontend OR backend but not both, we need full-stack ownership



HOW WE WORK

You'll work directly with the founder (product + AI architecture vision) and our lead developer (technical implementation + infrastructure). Communication is async-first with regular syncs. We move fast, we think deeply about architecture before building, and we expect you to challenge our thinking when you see a better path.



This is a long-term position. We're building something ambitious and need someone who wants to grow with it, not a freelancer looking for a 3-month gig. For the right person, we are offering stock options in the company and products we're building. We see you as the team player building together with us. Not just for us. If the contract is extended and we continue our partnership, you'll be receiving all the company benefits (devices, travel to Europe for meetings/conferences, etc). 



TO APPLY

Send the following:

1. Your GitHub profile or portfolio: we want to see code you've written, not just a CV

2. One or two projects you're most proud of: tell us what you built, what was hard about it, and what you'd do differently now

3. A short note (3-5 sentences) on: What interests you about working on an AI platform? What's the most complex system you've built or contributed to?

4. Tell us about a skill (something personal, not work-related) that you have been working on and how it changed you. We're looking for great people to work with. Your personal journey is equally as important as your professional skills. 



Skip the generic cover letter. We'd rather see how you think.

description:

description:
We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Copy Editor to support our team of Business Writers covering personal finance and global news. This role is responsible for ensuring all published content is accurate, clear, engaging, and error-free, while maintaining a consistent editorial voice and high-quality standards.



The ideal candidate has strong experience in editing financial and news content, with the ability to quickly refine articles under tight deadlines without compromising quality.



Work Schedule

12:00 AM to 8:00 AM (Philippine Time)

 Monday to Friday



Key Responsibilities



Edit and proofread news articles (breaking news, world news, and entertainment)

Ensure articles are grammatically correct, clear, concise, and well-structured

Fact-check key details to maintain accuracy and credibility

Improve readability by simplifying complex financial or economic language

Optimize headlines for clarity, engagement, and SEO performance

Ensure consistency in tone, style, and editorial guidelines (British formatting)

Review articles for logical flow, coherence, and overall quality

Catch errors in data, figures, names, and sources

Work closely with writers to refine content and maintain standards

Ensure all content is publication-ready within tight deadlines



Requirements



At least 2 years of experience in copy editing, journalism, or digital publishing

Excellent English grammar, editing, and proofreading skills

Strong understanding of personal finance and business/news topics

Familiarity with global news and economic trends

Ability to quickly edit and polish high-volume content

Strong attention to detail and commitment to accuracy

Experience working with online publishing platforms or CMS is a plus

Ability to work independently during graveyard shifts



What We’re Looking For



Exceptional attention to detail

Strong editing judgment and news sense

Ability to maintain speed without sacrificing quality

Strong understanding of what makes content clear and engaging

Consistency and reliability in meeting deadlines

Ability to handle breaking news and fast-paced publishing



Ideal Candidate Profile



You are someone who:

Can quickly spot and fix errors, inconsistencies, and weak phrasing

Understands how to make financial/news content more readable and impactful

Works efficiently under pressure and tight deadlines

Ensures every article meets a high editorial standard before publishing



Why Join Us



If you take pride in polishing content to perfection and ensuring every article is accurate, clear, and engaging, this role is for you.

title: Appointment Setter / Discovery Caller – High Commission Role | Warm Booked Calls | US Hours
description:

These are not cold leads.

People book directly into your calendar.



Your job is to run a 10–15 minute call, qualify them, and move the right people forward.



This role is built for people who want high upside, not just a fixed salary.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Take booked discovery calls directly from your calendar

Run short (10–15 min) calls to qualify leads

Ask direct questions and control the conversation

Move qualified prospects to the next stage

Disqualify poor-fit leads quickly

Keep CRM notes clean and accurate

Stay consistent during US time zones



What You’ll Get:

OTE $1200 Per Month

Base pay introduced after a short, paid probationary period

Warm, inbound, pre-booked calls only

Clear call frameworks and qualification structure

A role where income is directly tied to your performance



Why This Role Stands Out:

No cold calling or chasing leads

You speak only with people who already booked

Short calls = higher volume + more earning potential

Send a Loom (1–2 minutes) answering:



Your experience with calls (setting, qualifying, or closing)

— Pranav

Acquisition Ascensio

title: WordPress Developer
description:
We are a German web agency looking for someone who can help us with WordPress development. 



Our perfect candidate would be someone, who…



* Is available for project-based tasks 10-20h per week (sometimes more, sometimes less)

* Speaks English on level B2 or higher

* Has multiple years of experience working with WordPress and Elementor

* Has a solid understanding of CSS, HTML, JavaScript and PHP

* Has experience working with shared hosting infrastructure for debugging, speed optimization etc.

* Cares about clean webdesign (clean CSS code, design consistency across all pages etc.)

* Talks openly about problems and questions (mistakes happen, we just need to know about them)



Here are some example tasks:



* Debugging of websites (fatal error, plugin incompatibility etc.)

* JS/PHP programming for custom features (like a filter bar, ACF-related tasks, custom Elementor elements, WPForms-related tasks)

* Website performance optimization (Cache, CDN, server configuration)



Some info on us:



* Our agency was founded six years ago and focuses on website design and development

* As of September 2023 we support around 400 companies and organizations with their WordPress websites in the form of maintenance, development, design, migration and optimization

* Our core team so far consists of one web designer, one web developer, two website builders (Elementor) and two customer support/project managers all between the ages of 25 and 35. We are now looking for a second developer



If this sounds good to you and you would like to become a part of our team, we would love to hear from you!

title: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator
description:
We Are Hiring: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator

We are seeking an experienced Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator with strong medical administrative skills to support our medical Referral Department. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the end-to-end referral process, ensuring accurate coordination between providers, insurance companies, and patients to facilitate timely access to care.

title: Executive assistant
description:
Executive Assistant (Remote) — Sargent Connects - Beauty and Aesthetics Industry



Location: Remote (UK business hours)

Hours: Full-time, Monday to Friday

Pay: $10–$14/hr depending on experience

Type: Long-term, stable role



This is not a VA role.



If you are looking for a job where you complete a task list and clock off, this is not for you.



This is a role for someone who thinks like an operator. Someone who reads a situation, identifies what needs to happen, and makes it happen — without being asked twice. Someone who treats the founder's time like it is the most valuable resource in the business, because it is.



We are Sargent Connects. We are a fast-growing marketing agency based in the UK, specialising in helping aesthetic and skin clinic owners scale their businesses. We have a small, high-performance team and we are growing fast. The founder needs a right-hand person who can keep pace with that growth and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.



That person is not a virtual assistant. That person is an Executive Assistant.



What this role actually looks like



You will work directly with the founder. You will own the calendar, the inbox, the task list, and the operational rhythm of the business. You will be the first person to know what is coming, the first person to flag what is at risk, and the person who makes sure the founder only touches things that genuinely require his attention.



On any given day, you might be managing client communications in GoHighLevel, setting up automations, coordinating with the team on Slack, preparing a briefing document for an upcoming call, tracking outstanding tasks, or solving a problem the founder does not even know exists yet.



You will not be given a rigid task list. You will be expected to build one yourself.



You are the right person if:



You have at least 3 years of experience supporting a founder, CEO, or senior executive — not just as a general VA, but in a role where you were trusted with real responsibility and operated with genuine autonomy.



You are fluent in English, both written and verbal, to a professional standard. You communicate clearly, concisely, and proactively.



You are available and responsive during UK business hours. This is a real-time role, not an async task-completion role.



You know GoHighLevel, Slack, and Google Workspace. You do not need to be taught what these tools are.



You are obsessive about detail. You do not let things slip. You have a system for everything and you can show it.



You are proactive by default. You do not wait to be told. You identify problems before they become fires and you bring solutions, not questions.



This is probably not for you if



You need to be micromanaged or given step-by-step instructions for every task.



You treat this as a side job or one of several clients you are juggling.



You are looking for a simple, low-pressure role where you can coast.



You have never supported a founder directly or operated in a fast-paced, growing business.



What you will get



A competitive rate of $10–$14/hr based on your experience and what you bring to the table. This is not a $5/hr VA role and the pay reflects that.



Performance bonuses tied to the growth of the business — when we win, you win.



A front-row seat inside a scaling UK agency. You will learn how a real business operates, how clients are managed, and how growth is built.



A long-term, stable role with a team that respects your time and your expertise. No revolving door. No micromanagement. No nonsense.





How to apply



No CVs. No cover letters. No copy-paste applications.



Fill in the form below. It takes 5 to 7 minutes. Show us how you think, not just what you have done.



We only consider applicants who apply via the form. If you cannot follow this instruction, you have already told us what we need to know.



Apply here (copy and paste into a new tab):




/

title: Already Using ChatGPT? Let's Build Something Bigger - Operations + AI Automation Assistant
description:
You already use ChatGPT or Claude in your daily work. Maybe you've played around with Make or n8n. Maybe you've built a small automation or two, or maybe you've just been itching to try.

Either way, you know AI is the future, and you want to go deeper.

I'm the founder of a growing Danish e-commerce company, and I'm building a team where AI isn't a buzzword, it's how we actually run the business. I'm looking for someone who can handle real operations work today, and help me automate it all tomorrow.

This role has two possible directions depending on your strengths and interests:

Path A: Customer Experience + AI. You take ownership of our customer support, learn every type of question and issue, and then build the AI systems that handle the repetitive ones automatically.

Path B: Supply Chain + AI. You manage inventory, suppliers, and logistics, and then build automations that monitor stock levels, flag issues, and keep everything running without manual check-ins.

Both paths lead to the same place: you becoming the person who builds the systems that run the business.

Day to day, you'll:



Handle real operations work (customer messages, supplier coordination, inventory, logistics)

Identify repetitive processes and map them out

Build and improve automations using tools like n8n, Make, ChatGPT, and Claude

Work directly with me to design workflows that replace manual tasks

Take ownership of your area and make it run smoother every week



You are:



Fluent in English, written and spoken. Non-negotiable.

Already using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) in your work or personal projects.

Familiar with n8n or Make, even if it's just basic flows or personal experiments. Or genuinely eager to learn them now.

Organized and detail-oriented. Automations built on messy thinking break.

Proactive. You see a problem, you fix it, you don't wait to be told.

Someone who gets excited about making things more efficient, not just doing the work.



This is not a "watch tutorials and learn someday" role. You'll be building real automations from week one.

Some overlap with European daytime hours is needed, but we're flexible on exactly when.

How to Apply

Stand out by completing all three steps:



Loom video (2-3 min max). Introduce yourself in English. Tell me about an automation or AI workflow you've built or experimented with, even a simple one counts. Then tell me which path (customer experience or supply chain) excites you more and why. Don't use a script. Google Drive video links work too.

Tony Robbins DISC profile. Take it free at 
/disc. Share your PDF result as a Google Drive link (set to "anyone with link can view").

Include the word UNICORN in the Subject line of your application. Not in the body, in the Subject line. This tells me you've read everything.



Applications missing any of these three steps will be archived without review.

title: Curious About AI? I'll Teach You - Junior Operations Assistant | Right Hand to Founder
description:
Are you curious about AI and automation tools, but don't know where to start?

I'll teach you.

I'm the founder of a growing Danish e-commerce company, and I'm looking for my next right hand. Someone who starts by doing the work, learns every part of the business, and then builds the AI systems that do it instead.

Let me be honest: in the beginning, this role is hands-on. You'll handle supply chain coordination, customer messages, and day-to-day operations. There will be a lot of manual work. That's the point, because you need to understand every process deeply before you can automate it.

But here's where it gets exciting. As you learn, I'll personally train you to use AI tools to replace the repetitive tasks, one by one. Every process you automate frees you up for bigger, more interesting work. The goal? Over time, there's less and less manual work, because you built the systems that handle it.

Six months from now, you won't be the person doing the tasks. You'll be the person who built the machine that does them.

You'll start with:



Coordinating with suppliers, freight forwarders, and our 3PL warehouse

Monitoring inventory levels and reorder timing

Handling customer
s and solving order issues

Tracking shipments and keeping data accurate

Whatever needs doing to keep the business running smoothly



Then you'll grow into:



Learning AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, n8n, automations) hands-on with me

Automating the manual processes you've been doing yourself

Building workflows and systems that run without you

Taking ownership of operations as your AI systems take over the repetitive work



You are:



Fluent in English, written and spoken. This is the only hard requirement.

Organized. You like structure and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

Proactive. "I fixed it" beats "what should I do?" every time.

Comfortable with numbers, spreadsheets, and keeping things accurate.

Curious about AI, no experience needed, just genuine interest.



No experience required. Attitude is everything.

Some overlap with European daytime hours is needed, but we're flexible on exactly when.

How to Apply

Stand out by completing all three steps:



Loom video (2-3 min max). Introduce yourself in English. Tell me what you enjoy outside of work, and why this role excites you. Don't use a script - we want to hear you, not a rehearsed pitch. Google Drive video links work too.

Tony Robbins DISC profile. Take it free at 
/disc. Share your PDF result as a Google Drive link (set to "anyone with link can view").

Include the word UNICORN in the Subject line of your application. Not in the body, in the Subject line. This tells me you've read everything.



Applications missing any of these three steps will be archived without review.

title: Appointment Setter (Commission With Base Pay)
description:
The Savvy Expat LLC is a fast-growing American relocation concierge company that helps American retirees and expats navigate the full A-Z logistics of moving to the Philippines. From visa processing and housing to banking and healthcare — we handle everything so our clients don't have to.



The Role

We're hiring a full-time Appointment Setter who will be responsible for calling and qualifying warm, nurtured leads coming directly from our YouTube channel and Instagram. These are not cold leads — these are people who already know who we are, have signed up for our newsletter, and have expressed interest in relocating to the Philippines.



Your job is to call these leads, qualify them, and book them into a discovery call with our closer. Simple, focused, and high-volume. This role also has a direct promotion track into a full Closing role for the right candidate. If you prove yourself as a setter, you will be trained and promoted into closing role with higher commission rates. 



Compensation



- Base Pay: ?20,000 per month

- Commission: 5% on every closed deal

- Performance-based salary increases

- P150,000 - P200,000 / month earning potential 

- Promotion into Closing Role based on performance — significantly higher earning potential



What You'll Be Doing



- Dialing 80–100 warm leads per day from our newsletter and Instagram pipeline

- Qualifying leads based on our criteria 

- Booking a minimum of 5 qualified discovery calls per day

- Managing followups 

- Logging all activity and updates into our CRM daily

- Eventually move into a closer role if you've proven the ability to book in 5 calls per day 



Who We're Looking For



- Filipino female with 3+ years of sales experience 

- Fluent and confident in English — you will be speaking with American clients daily

- Previous experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, or sales (minimum 2+ years)

- Comfortable with high-volume dialing — 80 to 100 calls per day is the standard, not the exception

- Strong understanding of both Western and Philippine culture — you'll be speaking the language of our clients

- Self-driven, goal-oriented, and hungry to grow into a closing role

- Able to work full time hours 



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



- 80–100 dials per day minimum

- 5 qualified booked calls per day

- Accurate and timely CRM logging

- Lead nurture follow-ups completed on schedule



Work Schedule

title: Shopify Product Administrator
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a meticulous and experienced Shopify Product Administrator to join Brand New Bathrooms, a growing UK eCommerce retailer specialising in bathroom furniture, baths, showers, toilets, radiators, tiles, and accessible bathing equipment.

This is a dedicated product-focused role. You will be responsible for the accurate uploading, updating, and maintenance of our entire product catalogue on Shopify. This is not a customer service position — your time will be spent entirely on product data, content, and catalogue management.

You must be available Monday-Friday, 9am–5pm UK time. There may be flexibility after a few months to move to local hours but not until a full understanding of how our product pages look has been gained.



Key Responsibilities

Product Uploading & Data Entry

• Upload new products to Shopify accurately and completely, including titles, descriptions, specifications, pricing, and variants

• Source and format product images to Shopify requirements, including resizing and basic editing where needed

• Set up product variants (size, colour, finish, etc.) and ensure all variant combinations are correct and complete

• Assign products to correct collections, add relevant tags, and configure metafields as required

• Input and maintain product weights, dimensions, and shipping details



Product Updating & Maintenance

• Update existing product listings with new pricing, revised descriptions, updated images, and specification changes

• Process supplier datapacks and price lists to identify and action changes across the catalogue

• Monitor and maintain stock status — marking products as in stock, out of stock, or discontinued as appropriate

• Identify and correct errors or inconsistencies across the catalogue (missing images, incorrect specs, broken variants)

• Carry out periodic catalogue audits to ensure quality and accuracy across all listings



Content & SEO Basics

• Write or lightly edit product descriptions to ensure they are clear, accurate, and consistent in tone

• Apply basic SEO principles to product titles, descriptions, and meta fields

• Maintain collection page content and ensure products appear in the correct categories



Administration & Reporting

• Maintain a product update log, tracking what has been uploaded, amended, or removed

• Work from supplier data files (Excel/CSV) to process bulk updates efficiently

• Follow detailed SOPs and checklists, and flag issues or discrepancies to the manager

• Use Trello or similar tools to manage and prioritise your daily workload



Required Experience & Skills

• 2+ years of hands-on experience working in the Shopify admin, with a strong understanding of products, variants, collections, metafields, and the media library

• Proven track record of uploading and managing large product catalogues in eCommerce

• Excellent data entry skills with very high accuracy — errors in product data directly affect sales and customer trust

• Proficient in working with Excel and CSV files, including filtering, sorting, and cross-referencing supplier data

• Able to read and interpret supplier datasheets and technical product specifications

• Comfortable using tools such as Trello, Google Sheets, and Google Drive

• Basic image handling skills — comfortable resizing and formatting product images using Canva or similar

• Excellent written English — product descriptions must be clear, professional, and consistent

• Strong understanding of product data quality and what makes a good, conversion-ready product listing



Desirable Skills

• Experience with bathroom, homewares, or interiors products

• Experience processing bulk product uploads using CSV import tools

• Familiarity with Shopify metafields and how they are used for structured product data

• Basic knowledge of on-page SEO as it applies to product and collection pages

• Experience working with multiple supplier brands and managing a multi-brand catalogue



Soft Skills

• Highly organised and methodical — able to handle large volumes of product data without losing accuracy

• Exceptional attention to detail — you take pride in getting every field right, every time

• Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision during UK business hours

• Reliable and consistent — you meet deadlines and flag issues early rather than letting them slip

• Open to learning new processes and improving catalogue workflows over time



Technical Requirements

• Reliable, fast internet connection (minimum 20 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload)

• A reliable computer with a modern browser — Chrome recommended

• Quiet, professional working environment during UK hours

• Ability to take screenshots and screen recordings when reporting issues

• Access to Microsoft Excel, Microsoft Office and



Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to become a core part of a growing UK eCommerce brand where your work is directly visible — every product you upload is live on our website and in front of customers.

You will be supported with thorough onboarding, detailed SOPs, and ongoing guidance. As the business grows, so do the opportunities: we offer performance-based salary reviews and the chance to grow into a senior catalogue or eCommerce operations role as the team expands.



How to Apply

Please submit the following with your application:

• Your CV / Resume

• A brief cover note explaining your Shopify product management experience and the types of catalogues you have worked on

• Screenshot of your internet speed test (Google: “internet speed test”)

• A list of 5 brands you think we currently sell on our UK website, Brand New Bathrooms — this demonstrates you have researched the business before applying

• Results from this English grammar test on the British-Study website: /en/grammar-test

• Include a screenshot of a Shopify product page you have set up (with any sensitive business information redacted if required)

title: Chat Sales Representative
description:
#Sales By Chat (Full-Time, Remote — EU Timezone Preferred)



We're looking for a sharp, emotionally intelligent, and fluent English writer to join our team as a Chat Closer.



No phone calls. No Zoom. No appointment setting. This role lives entirely in text. DMs, comment threads, chat conversations with warm leads who have already shown interest in what we do.



You'll be one of the first real conversations potential clients have with us. Your ability to ask the right questions, qualify fast, and guide the right person toward a 2,500 EUR decision, in writing, is what this role is built on.



If you love the craft of written conversation, can read between the lines of what someone is really asking, and want to work inside a business that's genuinely doing something different. keep reading.



---



What You'll Be Doing



- Responding to inbound leads across platforms (Instagram,
,
, WhatsApp) who have already engaged with our content or attended our free weekly workshop.

- Qualifying leads using two clear filters: are they already in business and selling? Does their audience have a real, painful problem people invest to solve?

- Closing enrollments at 2,500 EUR through chat. no calls, no handoff to another person.

- Managing follow-ups and keeping conversations moving without being pushy.

- Keeping CRM notes clean and organized.

- Using AI tools (including Claude) to draft responses, prepare for conversations, and work efficiently across a volume of threads.

- Flagging patterns: what's creating friction, what questions keep coming up, what's working.



---



You're a Great Fit If You



- Write with warmth, clarity, and zero fluff. Every message counts.

- Have experience in sales, chat-based customer conversations, or closing high-ticket offers.

- Are emotionally intelligent enough to read what someone actually means, not just what they wrote.

- Know how to qualify someone out as confidently as you qualify them in. We don't want wrong-fit clients.

- Are comfortable using AI tools daily, specifically Claude, to work faster and smarter. Not as a crutch. as a co-pilot.

- Are reliable and self-directed. You manage your pipeline without being chased.

- Prefer EU daytime hours or are flexible enough to match when leads are active.



---



AI Is Part of This Role



We use Claude as part of our daily workflow. For this role, that means:



- Using Claude to draft initial responses that you then edit and send in your voice.

- Using Claude to research a lead's context before engaging.

- Using Claude to flag objections and think through how to handle them.

- Using Claude to write follow-up sequences for leads who go quiet.



You don't need to be a developer. But you do need to be genuinely comfortable working with AI, prompting it well, and knowing when to trust it and when to override it. If you've never used Claude or a similar AI tool in a real work context, this probably isn't the right fit.



---



What We Offer



- A full-time, long-term role with room to grow.

- Performance bonuses tied to closes.

- Flexible hours. as long as you're responsive when leads are active.

- The chance to work inside a business that's genuinely building something new. not just running another coaching program.

- Direct access to Barak and Daria for questions, feedback, and calibration.



---



Tools We Use



- Go High Level (CRM + automations)

- Claude (AI, daily use)

- ClickUp (project and task management)

- Google Calendar

- Slack / WhatsApp for team communication

- Loom for async updates



---



To Apply



Apply through the link below. No DMs. No
s. Applications sent any other way won't be reviewed:







---



Mind Artists is the business of Barak Yaari and Daria Vodopianova. We help established experts build 7-figure method brands through The Method Formula. 170 clients in the last year. Clients from 20+ countries. 4,000+ live workshop attendees.

title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to

title: Brand & Content Designer (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Job description



At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health and improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain and discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain and distress others have to endure.



We’re seeking a full-time Brand and Content Designer to lead the creative direction of our brand across packaging, offline marketing, and digital platforms. This role is ideal for a strategic, hands-on creative who can own both design and content production, from ideation to execution, while supporting our expansion across Southeast Asia and global markets.



As a key member of the team, you'll be responsible for producing compelling visuals and content that reflect the heart of our brand and connect meaningfully with consumers, healthcare professionals, and distribution partners.



Key Responsibilities:



-Brand Development & Creative Direction-

*Lead development of visual identity for new and existing brands, including logos, packaging, brand guidelines, typography and brand story

*Propose and implement creative directions from Pantone color palettes to iconography, font systems and photography guidelines

*Establish and maintain consistent branding across all physical and digital touchpoints, while ensuring all brand assets are stored and updated in an organized, easily accessible database



-Graphic & Marketing Design-

*Design high-impact materials such as product packaging, brochures, point-of-sale displays, in-store visuals and Continuing Medical Education (CME) event collaterals

*Develop pitch decks, sales presentations and brand kits for internal and external stakeholders

*Create visuals for promotions, campaigns, and trade shows for greater awareness and conversion



-Content Creation & Copywriting-

title: Operations/Supply Chain - No Experience
description:
Are you curious about AI and automation tools, but don't know where to start?

I'll teach you.

I'm the founder of a growing Danish e-commerce company, and I'm looking for my next right hand. Someone who starts by doing the work, learns every part of the business, and then builds the AI systems that do it instead.

Let me be honest: in the beginning, this role is hands-on. You'll handle supply chain coordination, customer messages, and day-to-day operations. There will be a lot of manual work. That's the point, because you need to understand every process deeply before you can automate it.

As you learn, I'll personally train you to use AI tools to replace the repetitive tasks, one by one. Every process you automate frees you up for bigger, more interesting work.

Six months from now, you won't be the person doing the tasks. You'll be the person who built the machine that does them.

You'll start with:



Coordinating with suppliers, freight forwarders, and our 3PL warehouse

Monitoring inventory levels and reorder timing

Handling customer
s and solving order issues

Tracking shipments and keeping data accurate

Whatever needs doing to keep the business running smoothly



Then you'll grow into:



Learning AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, n8n, automations) hands-on with me

Automating the manual processes you've been doing yourself

Building workflows and systems that run without you

Taking ownership of operations as your AI systems take over the repetitive work



You are:



Fluent in English, written and spoken. This is the only hard requirement.

Organized. You like structure and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

Proactive. "I fixed it" beats "what should I do?" every time.

Comfortable with numbers, spreadsheets, and keeping things accurate.

Curious about AI, no experience needed, just genuine interest.



No experience required. Attitude is everything.

Some overlap with European daytime hours is needed, but we're flexible on exactly when.

How to Apply

Stand out by completing all three steps:



Loom video (2-3 min max). Introduce yourself in English. Tell me what you enjoy outside of work, and why this role excites you. Don't use a script - we want to hear you, not a rehearsed pitch. Google Drive video links work too.

Tony Robbins DISC profile. Take it free at 
/disc. Share your PDF result as a Google Drive link (set to "anyone with link can view").

Include the word UNICORN in the Subject line of your application. Not in the body, in the Subject line. This tells me you've read everything.



Applications missing any of these three steps will be archived without review.

title: Azure Cloud Engineer
description:
About The Attic AI 

The Attic AI is an AI company that builds and deploys AI and machine learning solutions for clients across different industries. We handle the end-to-end lifecycle, from scoping and data pipeline design through model development, deployment, and monitoring. Our team includes data scientists, ML engineers, software engineers, and R&D researchers working together to deliver production-grade AI systems. We’re a growing team, which means you’ll have real ownership over how things are built and how we operate.



Role Overview 

In this role, you'll work across Azure services, Databricks data platforms, and enterprise systems such as Salesforce, Workday, and ServiceNow to deliver scalable, secure, and production-ready cloud solutions. This is a hands-on engineering role where you'll have real ownership over what you build, from scoping through deployment and operations.



What you'll work on:

• Designing, deploying, and managing Azure cloud infrastructure (AKS, Azure Functions, App Services, Virtual Networks, Azure SQL)

• Building and maintaining data pipelines and workflows on Databricks (ETL/ELT, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog)

• Developing integrations with enterprise systems including Salesforce, Workday, and ServiceNow

• Implementing Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Bicep, or ARM templates

• Setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps

• Building automation workflows and monitoring, alerting, and i
 response systems



Basic qualifications:

• At least 2 years of experience as a Cloud Engineer, DevOps Engineer, or Platform Engineer

• Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure services (AKS, App Services, Azure SQL, Entra ID, Key Vault)

• Experience with Infrastructure as Code tools (Terraform, Bicep, or ARM templates)

• Experience with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes, Helm)

• Hands-on experience with at least one enterprise platform: Salesforce, Workday, or ServiceNow

• Proficiency in at least one scripting/programming language (Python, Bash, PowerShell, or Go)

• Strong documentation and communication skills



Work Setup:

• Open to Philippine-based applicants only

• Remote (optional co-working space in BGC)

• Full-time

• Shift: 7:00 PM – 3:00 AM

title: Quantity Surveyor / Civil Engineer (BIM & AutoCAD) - UK/Ireland Projects (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, partitions, and MEP (Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing) systems.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Quantity Surveyor/Office Engineer to join our dynamic team. This multifaceted role combines quantity surveying expertise with office engineering and financial administration, focusing on accurate cost estimation, project budgeting, and comprehensive project support. The successful candidate will work closely with our project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure precise cost control and seamless project delivery from concept to completion.



Key Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Quantity Surveying



Project Estimating: Calculate materials, labor costs, and overall project budgets with precision

BOQ & BOM Preparation: Develop comprehensive Bills of Quantities and Bills of Materials for all projects

Job Pricing: Analyze construction plans and prepare detailed quantity requirements and pricing structures

Contract Analysis: Scrutinize maintenance costs, material expenses, and contracts to secure optimal deals

Tender Management: Analyze tenders and manage procurement processes for construction and design projects

Prepare accurate brickwork and blockwork quantity take-offs, including bricks, blocks, mortar, lintels, insulation, and related masonry components

Analyze brickwork labor and material rates to ensure competitive and accurate pricing

Coordinate and support MEP system costing, estimation, and documentation (mechanical, electrical, and plumbing works)

Estimating Tools: Utilize software including Simpro, JobTread, Bluebeam, PlanSwift, CostX, Measure Square, Stone Pro, and Microsoft Office to support estimating, budgeting, and project documentation.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Stakeholder Liaison: Coordinate with site managers, clients, contractors, and subcontractors to ensure smooth project execution

Reporting: Prepare comprehensive reports, analyses, contracts, budgets, and risk assessments

Strategic Advisory: Advise managers and clients on cost improvements, new strategies, and savings opportunities

Change Management: Document design changes and update budgets accordingly

Material Management: Track materials inventory and coordinate ordering when required



Financial Administration & Office Support



Invoice Management: Handle invoicing processes and perform data entry for financial documentation

Administrative Support: Assist staff accountants and handle various office and financial tasks

Client Administration: Manage administrative tasks delegated by clients with efficiency and accuracy



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Quantity Surveying: Proven experience in cost estimation, BOQ preparation, and quantity surveying methodologies

Construction Knowledge: Strong understanding of construction processes, materials, and industry standards

2D/3D CAD Design: Experience or familiarity with 2D and 3D CAD software preferred for project visualization and technical drawings

Financial Acumen: Experience with budget management, financial reporting, and cost control

Contract Management: Knowledge of construction contracts, procurement, and tender analysis

Simpro Experience: Hands-on experience using Simpro for job costing, project budgeting, invoicing, and workflow management



Professional Skills



Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities with exceptional attention to detail

Software Proficiency: Competency in quantity surveying software, spreadsheet applications, and financial systems

Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills for client and contractor liaison

Organization: Outstanding organizational skills with ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

Adaptability: Flexibility to handle diverse administrative and technical tasks



What We Offer

Competitive salary package

Opportunity to work with self-builders across Ireland and the UK

Professional development and training opportunities

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Career growth potential within an expanding company

Involvement in diverse construction and visualization projects

Remote working flexibility with comprehensive project support systems

Experience working on international projects with diverse clients.



Application Instructions

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
Full-Time Fullstack Developer. Remote & Long-Term Role.



About the Company  

Wired to Create (WTOC) is a creative-tech company based in Stockholm, Sweden / Schwyz, Switzerland.  



In one of our four verticals, we are building modern AI-powered SaaS systems, tools, and media platforms that merge design, technology, and creativity.  



Our ecosystem includes several high-end products. The one we’re mainly looking a full-time hire for is for an AI-powered POS & retail backoffice platform. 



We move fast, build smart, and design beautifully, combining modern tech with creative direction. We need someone who’s a seasoned developer and who isn’t afraid to move together with future technology. We use AI as part of our tech stack, allowing us to build fast. This is a requirement. 



About the Role  

We’re looking for a Fullstack Developer based in the Philippines to join our team full-time (160h/month).  



You’ll work directly with our founder, a creative polymath and architect, to build and scale production-ready SaaS systems.  

You’ll start by developing the POS platform, and later contribute to other systems as we grow.



Responsibilities  

- Build frontend using React, TypeScript, Vite, Node.JS  

- Manage backends with Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, RLS, Edge Functions)  

- Implement automation workflows using n8n (API, AI, Claude/OpenAI integrations)  

- Integrate REST APIs, OAuth, and webhooks  

- Maintain clean, modular architecture and readable code  

- Collaborate daily via Slack Huddles

- Follow a design system and Tailwind tokens for UI consistency  

- Deploy and manage builds via GitHub + Netlify/Vercel  

- Communicate progress, blockers, and next steps clearly (no silent days)

- Use Claude Code to speed up production time and scale 



Stack & Tools  

React, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS, Supabase, PostgreSQL, n8n, Claude Code, OpenAI API, GitHub, Netlify/Vercel



Qualifications  

- 3+ years of experience in modern fullstack development  

- Strong knowledge of React and TypeScript  

- Strong knowledge of Supabase and PostgreSQL  

- Strong knowledge with APIs, automation tools, and database design  

- Comfortable with asynchronous remote collaboration  

- Excellent English communication skills  



Bonus Skills  

- Experience with retail systems or dashboards  

- Experience with AI APIs (Claude, OpenAI, etc.)  

- CSV data handling and analytics  



Culture & Expectations  

We operate as a startup; fast, structured, and creative. Our culture is built on speed, accountability, ownership, and clarity.  

We value people who think beyond code, who understand product, user experience, and creative direction.  



You’ll work closely with our founder in a dynamic environment where feedback is instant, iteration is fast, and growth is guaranteed.  



Growth Opportunity  

WTOC is designed as a product ecosystem.  

Each system we build can evolve into its own company.  



Top-performing developers will be offered stock options or vesting packages in future spin-offs, as well as leadership opportunities in product teams.



Working Hours  

8 AM – 5 PM PH time    

Some flexibility required for onboarding or launches.



Compensation  

Upon agreement 

Long-term position with performance-based raises and option eligibility.



How to Apply  

1. Short introduction (why this role fits you)  

2. Portfolio or GitHub links (SaaS or fullstack projects preferred)  

3. Optional 1-minute Loom/video introduction  

4. Internet speed test screenshot  

5. Availability (start date and timezone)

title: Experienced Cold Caller for Law Firm Outreach
description:
About Us

WeCare Mobile DNA is a Georgia-based mobile DNA testing company. We provide fast, confidential, and professional mobile DNA testing services for clients at their home, office, or another convenient location. Our services support legal needs through AABB-accredited lab partners and a smooth, client-friendly process.



About the Role

We are looking for an experienced cold caller to contact law firms and related legal offices in Georgia, introduce our referral program, and get interested offices booked on an onboarding call with our team.



This role is focused on outreach to law firms and related legal offices that may work with clients who need paternity or relationship DNA testing. The goal is to speak with the right person in the office, explain the value of our program, collect basic lead information, and schedule an onboarding call.



What You’ll Do

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer (History Docuseries | High-CTR / Viral Style)
description:
About Us:



My name is Reece, and we’re expanding our network of YouTube channels across history-focused niches, using storytelling and long-form videos.



We’re building a portfolio of high-performing YouTube channels designed to reach millions of viewers globally, and we’re looking for a Thumbnail Designer who understands clicks (not just design)



Your work will directly impact whether a video gets ignored… or gets 100K–1M+ views. Thumbnails are one of the biggest drivers of that growth.



This isn’t a one-off project. There’s long-term upside as we expand into more channels.



The Opportunity:



This is not a typical design role. You’ll be responsible for creating thumbnails that:

- Stop the scroll

- Create curiosity instantly

- Drive high click-through rates (CTR)



You’ll work on content designed to:

- Hit 100K–1M+ views

- Compete with fast-growing history channels

- Stand out in highly competitive feeds



You won’t just design. You’ll help shape:

- The visual style of the channel

- What makes someone click vs scroll past



Style We’re Targeting:

- 

- 

- 



Your job is to replicate and adapt this high-performing style, while maintaining consistency across our channel.



What You'll Do:

- Take base artwork/images and optimise for maximum clicks

- Add bold, eye-catching text overlays

- Create strong contrast, depth, and visual hierarchy

- Ensure thumbnails are optimised for mobile viewing

- Create variations when needed for testing

- Use of AI tools is welcomed and encouraged



Performance Standard:

- The reference channels average 200K–1.5M views per video.



Your thumbnails should match that:

- Clear

- Curiosity-driven

- Viral, aggressive, and impossible to ignore

- Optimised based on performance (not just how it looks)



Upsides:

- You’ll learn how high-performing thumbnails are actually created

- Long-term, consistent work as we scale multiple channels

- Clear direction and reference styles

- Fast feedback loops (you’ll improve quickly)

- Opportunity to grow into a Lead Designer role

- Work on content designed to scale globally



Position Details:

- 30–60 thumbnails per month

- Ongoing work for the right, reliable person

- Turnaround time: 24–48 hours per thumbnail

- Budget: $5 per thumbnail

- Consistent monthly volume

- Long-term opportunity based on performance



Ideal Candidate:

- Understands YouTube CTR psychology

- Strong Photoshop/design skills (AI tools are a plus)

- Can replicate and adapt proven thumbnail styles

- Takes direction well and iterates quickly

- Consistent, reliable, and detail-oriented



How to Apply:

- Send your portfolio of YouTube thumbnails (history niche style preferred)

- Include before/after examples showing your optimisation work

- Confirm that you can match the viral style shown in the references

- Share your typical turnaround time

- Start your message with your favourite animal
