title: Tester – GitHub Pipelines & Test Automation (Remote)
description:
Join one of Australia’s leading database development companies and work on real world systems used by well known international clients.



At DB Gurus, you’ll build high quality, scalable database driven applications while continuing to grow your skills in modern technologies such as AWS and AI assisted development tools—all within a supportive, fully remote team.



About DB Gurus

DB Gurus is a specialist database development company with over 16 years’ experience delivering reliable, easy to use solutions for clients across multiple industries worldwide.



At DB Gurus, you’ll help ensure the quality of scalable, database driven applications while expanding your experience with modern testing tools, GitHub Pipelines, and emerging technologies such as AWS and AI assisted tools—within a supportive, fully remote team.



The Role

We’re looking for a Tester with strong experience in GitHub Pipelines and test automation who takes pride in delivering high?quality, well?tested software and enjoys working closely with developers and project teams. 

As a Tester, you will be responsible for validating software functionality, reliability, and performance across multiple projects. You’ll work closely with developers, QA, and project managers to ensure testing is embedded throughout the development lifecycle.



This role suits someone who is detail oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a structured, process driven environment.



Rate: AUD $6 – $7 per hour (based on experience)



What We Offer

• Fully remote, work from home role

• Flexible working arrangements

• Stable, long term contract

• Supportive and approachable management

• Opportunity to work on real world, production systems

• Collaborative team environment with developers and QA support



Key Responsibilities

• Review requirements and specifications to design clear, comprehensive test cases

• Create, manage, and execute test cases using GitHub Pipelines

• Perform manual and automated testing across applications and systems

• Design and maintain automated test scripts to improve test coverage and efficiency

• Identify, document, and track defects, working closely with developers to validate fixes

• Participate in test planning, estimation, and status reporting

• Contribute to the continuous improvement of testing processes, frameworks, and standards



Requirements



Essential:

• Proven experience as a Tester / QA Engineer or similar role

• Strong hands on experience with GitHub Pipelines

• Experience with test automation tools and frameworks (e.g. Selenium, Appium, or similar)

• Solid understanding of SDLC and testing methodologies

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to high quality outcomes

• Clear communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with remote teams

• Honest, reliable, and able to follow standards and specifications



Nice to have:

• Familiarity with C# 
 based applications

•  Copilot CLI experience

• AI Agent experience

• Experience testing database driven systems



Availability:

• Preferably available for at least 6 hours between 9:00 am and 5:00 pm (GMT+10)



How to Apply

If you wish to apply, please send your application starting with:

“Ref: Tester”

and include three of your key strengths.



Please note: we only hire individuals. Recruitment agencies need not apply.

title: Bilingual Scheduling  Manager (English–Spanish) Cleaning Company – Full Time Remote
description:
We are residential cleaning company in the United States and we are looking for a highly organized, reliable, and detail-oriented Bilingual Scheduling  Manager to join our team long-term.



In this role you  will manage the schedules of cleaners and schedule clients (existing and new). You must be able to communicate clearly with clients in English and with cleaners in Spanish, using a friendly but professional tone.



If you love organization, problem-solving, scheduling, and keeping operations running smoothly, this is the perfect position for you.



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



DAILY SCHEDULING & DISPATCH

• Manage and update the daily cleaning schedule

• Assign cleaners to jobs based on availability, skills, and travel distance

• Handle last-minute changes, rescheduling, and cancellations

• Ensure all jobs move through scheduling, confirming and completion

• Finalize the next day’s schedule (plan ahead 2 - 7days) 



CLIENT COMMUNICATION (ENGLISH)

• Send confirmations to clients using templates

• Handle scheduling  details  for new clients and and/or rescheduling or special requests 

• Maintain clear and professional communication at all times



CLEANER COMMUNICATION (SPANISH)

• Collaborate  daily with cleaners to organize their schedule based on availability 

• Handle questions, delays, cancellations

• Reassign jobs as needed



OPERATIONS MANAGEMENT

• Maintain detailed notes for all clients and cleaners

• Keep all schedules organized inside our system

• Coordinate with our VAs for repetitive tasks

• Identify and resolve scheduling issues quickly

• Communicate calmly under pressure and during busy days



TEAM COLLABORATION

• Work closely with the owner and support VAs

• Attend brief daily check-ins as required

• Provide end-of-day summaries when needed



REQUIREMENTS

• Fluent in English and Spanish (required)

• Excellent communication skills in both languages

• Strong organizational and multitasking ability

• Experience in scheduling, dispatching, or operations preferred

• Ability to work U.S. hours (full-time) (part time could be considered if you are strong candidate)

• Fast typing and comfort with technology

• Ability to handle a high volume of messages

• Problem-solving skills and the ability to think independently

• Calm, reliable, and proactive personality

• Experience with cleaning companies, home services, or similar industries is a plus



TOOLS WE USE (Experience helpful but not required)

• OpenPhone (Quo)

• Service Autopilot and Booking Koala 

• Google Sheets

• OneNote





Training will be provided — but you must naturally be organized, disciplined, and able to manage many moving parts at once.



WORK HOURS & COMPENSATION

• Full-time, long-term position (Part time can be considered if you are strong candidate 

• Must be available during U.S. business hours (Eastern Time preferred)

• Salary range: $800–$1,300 USD per month (depending on experience)/ Weekly Pay and Paid Training 

• Pay increases based on performance

• Stable, long-term job in a growing company



HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

 1. Your resume

 2. A short video or text explaining why you are a good fit

 3. Your availability (hours per day and timezone)



Only apply if you are fluent in both English and Spanish and are looking for a long-term, stable role.



Regards, 



Carissa

title: VA | Service based business
description:
Title:

Virtual Assistant — Systems Builder, Customer Follow-Up & Social Media | Golden Mobile Detailing



Hey, I'm Paxton, owner of Golden Mobile Detailing, a mobile auto detailing company in Wisconsin (United States). We're growing fast, and we need a sharp VA who can help us build out the systems and SOPs that will allow us to scale and then stay on to run those systems day-to-day.

This isn't a "data entry" role. We want someone who thinks, takes initiative, and actually cares about doing excellent work. You'll work directly with our team.



What you'll do:

- BUILD SYSTEMS & SOPs (primary focus): Create and organize the internal playbooks, workflows, and standard operating procedures in Notion that our team uses to run and scale the business. This is the core of the role. If you love building structure and making things run smoothly, this is for you.



- CUSTOMER FOLLOW-UP: Text and follow up with customers after their service. Check-ins, rebooking reminders, review requests, and referral prompts. You'll manage this communication using our templates and scripts.



- LEAD FOLLOW-UP: Respond to DMs and inquiries coming in through Instagram and
, and follow up with leads until they book.



-SOCIAL MEDIA: Schedule content, write captions, and help keep our Instagram and
 active and professional.



-
 MANAGEMENT: Handle
 inquiries and communicate with customers professionally on behalf of Golden.



- GENERAL ADMIN: Light scheduling, Slack updates, and other support tasks as needed.



What we're looking for:

- Excellent written English - your communication represents our brand. Experience building SOPs, workflows, or systems is required, not a bonus. Organized, reliable, and proactive - someone who doesn't wait to be told what to do next. 

Experience with Notion or a strong willingness to learn fast. Comfortable texting and following up with real customers. Familiar with Instagram and
. Available to align with US Central Time hours. Stable internet and a solid home office setup.



Pay & benefits:

Pay depends on experience and skill level at 20–30 hrs/week. Pay is weekly for the first two months, then switches to monthly. We also honor the 13th month bonus every December without exception. 



To apply:

In the subject line, write "Golden Mobile Detailing VA - [your name]" and in the first line of your message, tell us: what's one system or SOP you've helped build for a previous employer? What did it do, and how did it help the business?



Or message us at
or

title: AI Image Generation VA — Daily Ad Creative Production (Long-Term)
description:
Dear Candidate,



I run a DTC e-commerce business and I'm looking for a Virtual Assistant with proven experience in AI image generation to support our daily ad creative production.

Your task is straightforward: turn written briefs into scroll-stopping, highly realistic ad visuals — every day, consistently.

This is a focused, output-driven role. It suits someone who is experienced with AI image tools, coachable, and able to deliver ad-ready work without being walked through the basics.

Please read carefully and only apply if you are genuinely confident this role is a good fit for you.



About The Role:

As an AI Image Generation VA, you are responsible for producing a daily batch of AI-generated images (volume varies, typically between 20 and 50).

The main focus is highly realistic native-style visuals for
 ads. Occasionally, other styles will be needed — before/after visuals, clean e-commerce product shots, or advertorial-style imagery.

This is an ongoing, long-term position with consistent daily work.



What You Will Do:

- Produce a daily batch of AI-generated images based on written briefings

- Deliver highly realistic native-style ad visuals as the main output

- Produce other styles occasionally (before/after, product shots, advertorial)

- Upload finished images to a shared Google Drive folder, organised per briefing

- Communicate daily via Slack — progress, questions, and feedback

- Refine output quickly based on coaching and direction



Your Workflow:

- You receive a written brief via Slack each day with a short description per image (concept, setting, persona, mood), sometimes with a reference image

- You generate the images using the AI tool of your choice (Nano Banana is what I use personally, but you're free to use any tool that delivers the required quality)

- You upload the finished images to Google Drive at the end of the workday

- I review and approve — if revisions are needed, you refine based on my feedback



What We're Looking For:

- Proven experience with AI image generation tools — confident in prompting, iterating, and producing ad-ready output

- Coachable — I'll direct you on the output I need, but I won't teach you how to use the tools themselves

- Reliable and consistent — daily delivery is essential

- Strong team player with a good attitude, follows direction well, and communicates clearly

- Detail-oriented and quick to adapt based on feedback

- Structured and consistent in your work

- Strong written English

- Reliable internet connection

- Available on a consistent daily basis

- Interested in a long-term collaboration



The Details:

- Rate: $4/hour

- Commitment: Ongoing, long-term

- Communication: Slack (daily)

- Delivery: Google Drive, daily

- Timezone: Flexible



How To Apply:

To show you have carefully read this post, please start your application with the word watermelon, followed by a short introduction about yourself.



Please also answer briefly:

- What is your experience with AI image generation?

- Which AI image tools have you used, and which do you prefer?

- Share a portfolio or 3–5 samples of AI-generated images you've created (especially any ad creative or realistic native-style work)

- Do you have any experience with DTC, e-commerce, or
 ad creative?

- What is your weekly availability? (days per week and hours per day)



Applications without samples or a portfolio will not be considered.

Selected candidates will be invited to the next steps of the selection process.



Best regards,

Marwan

title: Seeking Youtube Video Editor
description:
I am looking for a skilled Video Editor with strong B-roll instincts to edit YouTube videos for my marketing agency's channel. Most videos are talking-head educational content about Google Ads for trades businesses. On the job training and style guides will be provided.



SKILLS

-Video Editing Software (Capcut, Descript, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve or other) (REQUIRED)

-Strong B-roll selection and motion graphics (REQUIRED)

-Ability to create or source animated Google Ads / Google Search mockups (REQUIRED)

-Background music selection

-Basic color correction

-After Effects knowledge (helpful, not required)



YOU

-You are detail-oriented and your edits are clean and polished

-You understand YouTube pacing and what holds viewer attention

-You are punctual and hit deadlines reliably

-You can work independently and solve problems on your own

-You are willing to learn the style of my channel and improve over time



ABOUT ME

-I am the director of Bluelight, a marketing agency based in Auckland, New Zealand. We provide -Google Ads and SEO services trades companies across NZ. The 

 -YouTube channel teaches these businesses how to get more leads online.



TASKS

-Editing raw talking-head footage into polished YouTube videos

-Sourcing and inserting relevant video B-roll and animations

-Adding background music and cleaning audio

-Simple text overlays and chapter markers

-Delivering final files ready to upload



POSITION

-Part-time to start, 10 hours per week. Potential to grow into a long-term role as the channel expands. 

Does this sound like you? Then I look forward to reading your application.



HOW TO APPLY FOR THIS JOB

-Reply and put in your subject line "Rockstar Video Editor - [Your Name]"

-At the top of your message write 3 sentences on why you want this position and why you are a good fit. Do not write more.

-Include 2 links to YouTube videos you edited that best shows your B-roll work.

-Tell me which editing software you use (one word).

-How many Google reviews does my company currently have?

-In one sentence, who do you think the target audience of my YouTube channel is?



Make sure to follow all of the steps above. This is a long-term opportunity with room for growth and raises, so I will only consider serious applicants. If I d
 to interview you, the next step is a paid test task. Do not write more than what I have asked above. If you write more than what is asked, I will not consider your application.



Thank you.

description:

title: Property Accountant – US Real Estate (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
ABOUT THIS JOB



CinRetta Digital is a growing digital firm supporting US-based real estate and property management companies. We are expanding our accounting team and are looking for a skilled Property Accountant who can handle full-cycle property accounting tasks for multiple US client accounts.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role best suited for a Filipino accounting professional who is detail-oriented, self-motivated, and comfortable working independently with US clients.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



• Manage and maintain financial records for US-based property portfolios

• Process accounts payable and receivable for property management operations

• Perform bank reconciliations, tenant ledger reviews, and general ledger maintenance

• Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

• Assist with budgeting, variance analysis, and operating expense reports

• Coordinate with property managers and clients on billing and collections

• Process rent rolls accurately and on time

• Ensure compliance with US GAAP and applicable accounting standards

• Assist with year-end closing and audit support



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE



• Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

• 3+ years of accounting experience (property accounting experience is a big plus)

• Hands-on experience with accounting software: Yardi, MRI, AppFolio, or QuickBooks

• Strong Excel and Google Sheets proficiency

• Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal

• Strong attention to detail, organization, and ability to manage deadlines

• Can work independently and handle multiple client accounts



Nice to Have:

• Prior experience supporting US-based clients in a remote setup

• Familiarity with US GAAP and US real estate accounting workflows

• Experience using Google Workspace, Asana, or Slack



WHAT WE OFFER



• Stable, long-term full-time remote work

• Competitive compensation (to be discussed upon interview)

• Work-from-home setup with flexible and structured workflows

• Opportunity to work with US real estate clients and grow your expertise

• Supportive and collaborative team environment



HOW TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

• Your updated resume or CV

• A short cover letter explaining your property accounting experience

• List of accounting software you have worked with

title: E-Commerce CRO & Creative Strategist (Landing Pages + Conversion Optimization)
description:
We’re looking for a high-level E-Commerce CRO & Creative Strategist who knows how to turn traffic into revenue.



This role combines conversion optimization, landing page execution, copywriting, and creative strategy. You must have real experience building landing pages, writing direct response copy, and developing winning creative angles—not just analyzing data.



You should understand why people buy, and how to align messaging, visuals, and offers to drive results.



This is a performance-driven role. We care about results, speed, and execution.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Build and optimize high-converting landing pages (Shopify or similar platforms)

Write and refine direct response copy across landing pages and funnels

Run and manage A/B tests across product pages, funnels, and offers

Analyze user behavior using tools like Microsoft Clarity, heatmaps, and session recordings

Identify drop-off points and conversion bottlenecks, then implement solutions

Develop and lead creative strategy (angles, hooks, messaging, offers)

Work closely with media buyers and designers to align creatives with on-site experience

Continuously test headlines, offers, layouts, and UX to improve CVR and AOV



What We’re Looking For:



Proven experience working with e-commerce brands (DTC preferred)

Hands-on experience building landing pages (not just giving direction)

Strong copywriting background (direct response focused)

Experience as a creative strategist (angles, hooks, buyer psychology)

Strong understanding of CRO principles and testing frameworks

Experience using Microsoft Clarity or similar tools (Hotjar, etc.)

Ability to interpret data and turn insights into actionable changes

Someone who moves fast, tests often, and focuses on results



Bonus If You Have:



Experience scaling winning funnels

Familiarity with tools like Triple Whale, Google Analytics, or Meta ads



Application Questions (Required):



Please answer all questions below. We will not review applications without detailed responses.



Landing Pages (Show Your Work)

Share 2–4 landing pages you’ve personally built.

For each, include:

Your role (what you specifically did)

The goal of the page

The results (CVR, AOV, revenue, etc.)



CRO Testing Experience

Walk us through a specific A/B test you ran.

What was the hypothesis?

What did you change?

What were the results?

What did you learn?



User Behavior Analysis

Using a tool like Microsoft Clarity or similar, describe a time you identified a conversion issue.

What did you see in the data?

What changes did you make?

What was the outcome?



Creative Strategy & Angles

Give an example of a product or funnel where you developed the creative strategy.

What angle or hook did you choose and why?

How did it translate into the landing page?

What performed best?



Copywriting (Direct Response)

Provide a sample of landing page copy you’ve written (headline + section or full page).

Briefly explain:

Who the target customer was

What pain or desire you focused on

Why you structured it that way

title: Senior SEO Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
We are hiring a Senior SEO Specialist to take ownership of and improve SEO performance across our video gaming marketplace.



You will be the primary driver of SEO improvements across the business, working across technical SEO, content, link building, and analytics to grow traffic and rankings.



This is not a task-only role. We are looking for someone who understands how SEO works end-to-end and can contribute to improving systems, not just executing tasks.



About Us

We operate a large online marketplace in the video gaming services space, with tens of thousands of monthly organic visitors and a high volume of content being produced.



We are looking to significantly scale our SEO performance across both existing and new listings.

Responsibilities



SEO Strategy & Growth

• Support and contribute to SEO growth across the site

• Identify opportunities to improve rankings, traffic, and conversions

• Assist in optimizing both existing and new pages



Link Building

• Manage backlink acquisition and ordering

• Evaluate backlink quality and relevance

• Ensure links are competitively priced and niche-appropriate

• Help maintain and improve backlink profile

• Identify harmful links when necessary



Content & Blog Optimization

• Work with a high volume of blog content (approximately 100 posts per month)

• Improve blog structure, formatting, and SEO optimization

• Help evaluate content performance and identify improvements

• Implement tracking such as UTM parameters on key links



Content Updates

• Assist in maintaining and improving a content update calendar

• Optimize key pages including titles, descriptions, FAQs, and structure



Technical SEO Support

• Assist with identifying technical SEO improvements

• Work with developers to implement updates

• Help improve site structure, indexing, and performance



Analytics & Performance Tracking

• Track and evaluate the effectiveness of blog posts, backlinks, and content clusters

• Monitor rankings, traffic, and performance trends

• Identify what is driving results and what is not

• Help build simple reporting and tracking systems



Requirements (Mandatory)

• Strong working experience across multiple areas of SEO

1) Technical SEO

2) Content SEO

3) Link Building

• Must be experienced with

Semrush

Similarweb

• Strong understanding of modern SEO and AI-assisted workflows

• Experience working with content at scale

• Ability to evaluate backlink quality

• Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability

• Ability to understand performance data and make improvements

• Highly organized and capable of working within structured systems

Preferred (Not Required)

• Experience with WordPress or WooCommerce

• Experience working with content teams or writers

• Experience in gaming, marketplaces, or similar niches



What We’re Looking For

We are not looking for a beginner SEO. We are looking for someone who:

• Understands how SEO works across multiple areas

• Can think beyond basic execution

• Can identify issues and suggest improvements

• Is reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent

• Focuses on long-term results



Compensation

• Full-time position, 40 hours per week

• $1,500 to $2,000 USD per month depending on experience

• Long-term role with growth opportunities

• Performance-based increases available



Benefits

• Paid vacation leave after 3 months

• Stable, long-term role with a growing company



Role Details

- Location: Remote (Philippines)

- Working Hours: TBD, Approximately 8 AM – 4 PM Philippine time

- Time Tracking: Required



How to Apply

• Include “CACTUS” in your subject line

• Briefly answer the following:

– What is the largest SEO or content operation you have worked on or contributed to?

– How did you track performance, output, or results?

– What tools or systems did you use to manage workflows or reporting?

– Give one example of how you improved an SEO process or system

• Attach your resume or a link to your LinkedIn profile

Applications that do not answer all questions will not be considered.



Important

Do not apply if you do not have hands-on SEO experience.

You must

• Have real experience working across multiple areas of SEO

• Understand how SEO workflows operate in practice

• Be capable of contributing to improvements, not just executing tasks

This is not a training role.

???

title: Operations Manager / Team Leader (Microloans – Night Shift, Remote)
description:
Operations Manager / Team Leader (Microloans – Night Shift, Remote)



We are a Canadian company based in Quebec, operating in the microloans industry across Canada, providing loans ranging from $250 to $2,500 nationwide.



We are currently looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations Manager / Team Leader to supervise employees and support multiple areas of our daily lending and collections operations.



This is a hands-on leadership role. The selected candidate must be capable of supervising staff while also performing operational tasks when needed.



About the Role



This is a multi-function operations leadership position, not a single-task job.



You will supervise employees responsible for loan approvals and collections, support team performance, and step in when necessary to ensure continuity of operations.



The ideal candidate is comfortable working in a fast-paced financial services environment and managing responsibilities independently.



Key Responsibilities



• Supervise employees handling loan approvals and collections

• Support and guide tea
mbers in their daily responsibilities

• Replace staff members when they are absent or unavailable

• Review and approve microloan applications according to company procedures

• Perform collections activities with clients across Canada

• Train employees on approval and collections processes

• Coordinate daily operational tasks across tea
mbers

• Prepare and manage employee work schedules

• Organize and maintain company documentation and internal records

• Support leadership with operational priorities

• Suggest workflow improvements and efficiency strategies

• Help ensure smooth operations across departments



This role requires someone capable of both leading the team and performing the same operational tasks when required.



Required Tools & Technical Skills



Candidates should already be comfortable using — or able to quickly learn — the following tools:



• 

• Microsoft Word

• Microsoft Excel

• Zapier

• Sloan (or similar lending / CRM platforms)



Strong digital adaptability is essential. Experience with AI-based productivity tools is considered a strong advantage.



The ideal candidate is comfortable:



• learning new systems quickly

• working independently with minimal supervision

• taking initiative to complete tasks proactively

• optimizing workflows using available software tools

• adapting to new technologies as operations evolve



Important Requirements



The candidate must feel comfortable working with:



• Microloan clients

• Loan approval processes

• Collections processes

• Remote employee coordination

• Financial services operational workflows



Experience in Canada or the United States lending environment is a strong advantage ?



Requirements



• Previous experience in lending, collections, or financial services

• Experience supervising or supporting employees

• Strong organizational and multitasking skills

• Ability to approve loan files independently

• Ability to perform collections activities when required

• Strong computer and digital tools proficiency

• Strong problem-solving ability

• Excellent communication skills

• Ability to take initiative without waiting for instructions

• Comfortable adapting to new software and AI tools

• Filipino and English bilingualism required

• Additional languages are an asset



Work Conditions



• Fully remote position

• Night shift schedule required ????

• Salary paid in Canadian dollars (CAD)

• Full-time long-term opportunity

• Work with a stable Canadian company

• Growth potential within the organization ????



Application Requirement (Video Required)



To apply, candidates must submit:



Updated CV

A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing:



• who you are

• whether you have worked with Canadian or U.S. financial workflows

• your experience using the software tools listed above



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Financial Planner
description:
We are seeking a highly analytical and self-directed Financial Planning & Analysis Lead with experience in the technology and professional services industry. This is a unique opportunity to build an FP&A function from scratch within a fast-scaling, PE-backed Microsoft ERP Partner. You will design and manage planning models, automate financial reporting, and deliver insights that drive decisions, investor confidence, and operational alignment.



Job Responsibilities:

-Budgeting & Forecasting: Build detailed financial models to support annual planning, monthly reforecasts, and scenario analysis (50+ tab workbooks).

-Management Reporting: Create close packages, trend analyses, dashboards, and commentary that communicate performance clearly to leadership.

-Headcount & Payroll Modeling: Construct dynamic payroll models linked to comp plans, benefits, and taxes; reconcile with HRIS and payroll data.

-Cash & Scenario Planning: Model cash runway, sensitivity scenarios, and forecasts to support investor visibility.

-Excel Model Stewardship: Maintain and audit complex Excel tools built by external consultants; ensure version control and formula integrity.

-Process Automation: Systematize reporting outputs via Power Query, Power BI, or no-code tools; create narrative templates for reporting.

-AI-Readiness: Partner with leadership on integrating AI tools (e.g., Copilot/GPT) into financial workflows.

-Stakeholder Partnering: Act as the finance liaison for HR, Legal, GTM, and other departments—translating numbers into actionable insights.

-ERP Transition Support: Collaborate on the migration from Microsoft Dynamics GP to D365 Business Central; support UAT and data validation.



Qualifications:

-8–10+ years of FP&A experience, ideally in PE-backed or fast-growth environments.

-Expert-level Excel skills (Power Query, nested formulas, scenario modeling, error checking).

-Proven success in forecasting, monthly reporting, and trend analysis.

-Strong communicator who can simplify complex financials for non-finance teams.

-Comfortable working remotely with U.S.-based stakeholders in PST hours.



Preferred Experience:

-ERP migration support (GP ? D365 BC).

-Exposure to GAAP readiness or audit prep.

-Familiarity with CRM and cohort metrics (Salesforce a plus).

-SaaS metrics knowledge: ARR, MRR, churn, CAC, LTV.



Tools You’ll Use:

-Excel (Power Query, Power Pivot), Power BI, Microsoft Dynamics GP & D365 BC, HRIS, CRM (Salesforce), Teams, Zoom, SharePoint.



Requirements:

-Updated Resume/CV.

-Reliable internet, personal computer, and backup power setup.

-Availability to work U.S. business hours 



Benefits:

-Competitive salary plus performance-based bonuses.

-Full remote flexibility.

-Long-term career growth

-Access to AI tools and automation support.

-Comprehensive HMO coverage for employee and immediate family.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% finance talent in the Philippines!

Highly organized and detail-oriented

title: Facebook Media Buyer
description:
Meta Media Buyer - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $5–$10 USD Per Hour



MUST HAVE at least 2 years of experience running Meta ads for e-commerce brands

Please list brands you have worked with and include proof of past ad accounts you've managed :)

MUST record an introductory Loom video with your application

Your personality type MUST be one with super strong attention to detail — if you're the type who misses small mistakes, this role is not for you

MUST have excellent written and spoken English — clear communication is non-negotiable



Hey there! We're a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we're looking for a Meta Media Buyer to join our team full-time. You'll work closely with our creative and strategy teams to launch, test, and scale winning ad campaigns for our Shopify customers.

Why This Role is Crucial:

This is one of the most important roles at our brand. If you're a skilled media buyer who thrives on launching campaigns that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your campaigns move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.

Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.

Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

As a Meta Media Buyer, you'll bring our team's deep strategic insights to life through precise campaign execution and sharp data analysis. Your ability to launch ads flawlessly, read performance data accurately, and make smart optimization decisions will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your buying decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every campaign is structured correctly.

Executing with precision — Launching campaigns cleanly, naming conventions done right, tracking in place, and zero sloppy mistakes. Attention to detail is non-negotiable.

Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Launch and manage Meta ad campaigns daily across multiple ad accounts.

Upload fresh creatives, set up A/B tests, and structure campaigns according to our playbook.

Monitor ad performance daily and flag winners, losers, and optimization opportunities.

Collaborate with our creative and strategy teams to ensure concepts are tested properly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Maintain clean, organized ad accounts with flawless naming conventions and tracking.

Communicate clearly in English — written and verbal — with the team every single day.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes Meta campaigns win or lose.

More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

You'll have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

Learn directly from operators running a multi 7-figure Meta ad operation.

Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you've been waiting for, I'd love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $5-10 USD per hour

Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to buy media from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology

Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday

Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience buying Meta ads for eCommerce brands?

What got you started in media buying?

Experience:

Meta Media Buying: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience required. + Will to learn

How to Apply

Please include: A short introductory Loom video about yourself, your experience with Meta media buying (brands you've worked with, results you've driven), and up to 5 examples MAX of past ad accounts or case studies you've worked on. Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day).

Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Software Engineer - Fintech Platform
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a Software Engineer to join our client's growing fintech engineering team and help build the systems that power real-world financial transactions. 



In this role, you’ll work on core banking and payment infrastructure, including transaction processing, cashback logic, reporting systems, and backend batch jobs used for operational workflows such as debt collection. You’ll collaborate closely with the Head of Engineering, as well as Product and Design partners, to deliver reliable, scalable, and customer-facing financial features.



This is a hands-on, backend-focused role ideal for engineers who enjoy working on payments, integrations, and cloud-based systems while still having visibility into how their work directly impacts customer experience.



If you're eager to work in a fast-paced environment and build elegant, efficient solutions for real-world financial challenges, we’d love to connect with you.





Key Responsibilities



Fintech Systems Development



Design, develop, and maintain core services within the banking and payment integrations layer.

Build and support features including cashback logic, transaction processing (e.g. Visa), and scheduled batch jobs for backend operations like reporting and debt collection.

Ensure robust, performant code and smooth deployment pipelines using modern cloud infrastructure.

Work closely with Product Managers and Designers to translate requirements into high-quality technical solutions.



Customer-Facing Feature Enhancements



Bring intuitive financial experiences to life by transforming UX/UI concepts into polished product features.

Continuously refine flows related to transaction histories, cashback programs, and user balances to enhance usability and clarity.

Contribute to improving customer engagement and satisfaction through thoughtful software development.



Team Collaboration and Growth



Share ideas and propose technical improvements to existing systems and workflows.

Participate in regular planning sessions and code reviews to support team cohesion and knowledge sharing.

Take on additional tasks as needed to support broader product or engineering goals.





Other Responsibilities



Make necessary process suggestions and improvements which can help the team.

Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed. 

Perform other related tasks and duties that may be assigned by the client later on.



About You



2 to 4 years of professional Software Engineer experience.

Solid background in software development and system design.

Proficiency in Golang, AWS ECS, and Terraform, or equivalent programming languages and cloud infrastructure tools.

Experience working closely with Product and Design teams to bring product roadmaps to life.

Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to thrive in a fast-paced fintech environment.

title: QBO e-Commerce Bookkeeper – RECON Focus| up to PHP45K | Remote | Morning Schedule | with Time Doctor
description:
About the Role



We are an Australian-based e-commerce business looking for a bookkeeper who can take full ownership of our books.



This is not a maintenance role.



You will be responsible for reviewing and reconciling 12–24 months of historical data, identifying discrepancies, and bringing the books to a clean, accurate state — then maintaining them moving forward.



If you are used to clean, easy books, this role is not for you.



If you are confident working through complex reconciliations where things don’t match, you will do well here.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Initial Focus

1. Review and reconcile 12–24 months of accounts

2. Identify discrepancies and fix issues

3. Ensure all records are accurate and properly structured



Ongoing Work

Daily: Post invoices and bills in QuickBooks Online

Weekly: Reconcile key accounts, assist with payroll

Monthly: Full reconciliation, review P&L, check accuracy

Quarterly: Assist with BAS and GST checks



What We’re Looking For:

1. Strong experience with QuickBooks Online

2. e-Commerce bookkeeping experience (WooCommerce, WordPress, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay, etc.)

3. Experience handling full reconciliations independently

4. Comfortable working with messy or incomplete records

5. Basic understanding (or willingness to learn) Australian accounting (BAS, GST, payroll)

6. Strong attention to detail and ownership mindset

7. Looking for a long-term role, not short-term work



Important (Please Read Before Applying)



This role involves:

1. Cleaning up backlog

2. Fixing discrepancies

3. Working through accounts that don’t immediately match



We are specifically looking for someone who:

1. Can investigate and solve problems independently

2. Does not give up when reconciling gets difficult

3. Wants to stay and improve the system long-term



Work Setup (Remote)

Full-time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: 7AM - 11AM & 1PM - 5PM PHT

SALARY: PHP 40,000 – 45,000/month



Compensation & Benefits

1. PHP 40,000 – 45,000/month

2. Free HMO (principal + 1 dependent)

3. Paid Christmas and New Year holiday break

4. Annual performance review (with potential salary increase or added perks)

5. Annual company-paid team building (meet the CEO and team)



Additional perks may include (based on performance and tenure):

1. Gym/Fitness assistance

2. Rent/housing assistance

3. Child tuition support

4. Medical expense support



How to Apply (STRICT):

1. To be considered, you must complete our screening form: 

2. Use subject line: RECON – [Your Name]



Applications without this will be automatically rejected.

title: Marketing Assistant (Lead Generation) – Full Time
description:
We’re a long-established digital marketing agency working with Australian accounting firms, and we’re looking for a mid-level Marketing Assistant who can take ownership of lead generation campaigns and help drive consistent new business.



This is not a “follow instructions all day” role. You’ll be expected to think, execute, and improve what you’re doing.



What You’ll Be Doing:



You’ll be responsible for setting up, running, and managing multiple outbound campaigns at the same time, including:



>> LinkedIn outreach and connection campaigns

>> Cold
 campaigns (setup, sending, and optimization)

>> Social media content creation and scheduling

>> Lead sourcing and list building

>> Preparing and sending proposals to prospects

>> Supporting our accounting-focused directory when needed



The goal is simple: generate qualified leads and book meetings consistently each week.



What We’re Looking For:



We’re looking for someone who is already experienced enough to figure things out and get results, not someone who needs constant direction.



>> Solid experience with lead generation / outbound marketing

>> Strong written English (this is essential)

>> Comfortable managing multiple campaigns at once

>> Able to work independently and take ownership of results

>> Familiar with common marketing, CRM, and automation tools

>> Experience with AI tools is a bonus



We use a wide range of premium tools 
 platforms, CRMs, scraping tools, social schedulers, etc.). You don’t need to know all of them — but you should be confident picking up new tools quickly.



Tools We Use:



You’ll be working with tools such as:



>> Mailshake, Manyreach, Inboxy, BrandNav

>> Salesflare, vbout (CRM)

>> LinkedIn + outreach tools

>> Publer, VistaCreate

>> Scrapebox, Outscraper, and other lead tools

>> Better Proposals

>> SuiteDash, Trackabi



(Experience with similar tools is perfectly fine)



Working Hours & Setup:



>> Monday to Friday

>> Australian Eastern Standard Time (2 hours ahead of PH)

>> Paid twice monthly in PHP (direct to your bank account)



You’ll need:



>> A reliable computer

>> Stable, reasonably fast internet

>> Consistent power supply



Salary & Growth:



>> Starting salary: P50,000/month (flexible for the right person)

>> Performance-based increases and bonuses available



We’ve been doing this for over 20 years and have worked with many Filipino tea
mbers — many stay with us long-term (5+ years) because we value reliability, competence, and results.



If you perform, you will be rewarded.



Important:



This is a full-time role. We’re looking for someone committed — not someone juggling multiple clients.



We track work and performance, and we expect a high standard. In return, you’ll be working with people who understand the job deeply and will support you properly.



How to Apply:



Do not just send a generic, standalone CV. Instead, send us



>> A short message explaining why you are a great fit for this role

>> Details of your relevant experience (specific campaigns/tools/results)

>> A Loom video (strongly preferred) introducing yourself and walking through your experience



Send applications to: 



If you’re experienced, reliable, and take pride in your work, this will be a great long-term opportunity.

title: AP & Billing Specialist
description:
I am seeking a detail-oriented and dependable AP & Billing Specialist to join my real estate company.



The AP & Billing Specialist will export invoice files from the utility billing system, import the same file into the accounting system, review invoices in the accounting system for accuracy, process payments for invoices online or via check as needed, mark invoices as paid in the accounting system, and other tasks.



Responsibilities:

- Process and review utility bills, invoices, and related financial data with accuracy and efficiency.

- Import, organize, and manage billing data using Vitality IO and other financial systems.

- Cross-check and verify unit-level, resident, or utility data using ResMan, Yardi, AppFolio, or other property management systems.

- Maintain accurate digital records and documentation in cloud storage platforms (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox).

- Utilize Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets to sort, filter, and reconcile billing data.

- Communicate with internal teams via
, chat, or video platforms (Zoom/Teams) to ensure timely resolution of billing-related issues.

- Assist with workflow tracking through Zendesk or CRM/ticketing tools as needed.

- Support recurring billing cycles and meet deadlines consistently while maintaining compliance with company standards.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in billing support, accounts payable, or data entry roles.

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy when handling financial data.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets (sorting, filtering, basic formulas).

- Experience with financial or property management software such as ResMan, Yardi, or AppFolio.

- Familiarity with billing or AP platforms (
, QuickBooks, SAP, etc.) preferred.

- Comfortable using Vitality IO (GreenPay) for billing workflows.

- Skilled in navigating
 & calendar tools (Gmail, Outlook), PDF editors (Adobe Acrobat), and cloud storage platforms (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox).

- Experience with Zendesk or CRM/ticketing tools for workflow tracking.

- Proficiency in Zoom/Teams for communication and collaboration.

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

- Highly organized, dependable, and capable of meeting recurring deadlines.

- Self-motivated with the ability to learn new tools, workflows, and processes quickly.

- Must be able to work full-time remotely during US Mountain business hours.



Apply here:

title: Recruiter (US) Crisp
description:
Compensation: $1,800 USD/month



Time Commitment: Full-Time | 40 hours/week



Working Hours: 8:55am–5:00pm EST (or longer as required to get the work done)



Engagement Type: 1099 Independent Contractor



Location: Remote (US-based hours required)



English Mastery and Working Culture Notice: Native-sounding and command-of-spoken English (and, of course, written English, as this is a role involving writing) is imperative in this role to interact with your U.S. counterparts. Please don’t apply if you do not have this skillset. Additionally, having formerly worked with companies in the U.S. market, and having that cultural and fast-paced working style understanding will be critical, as well.



Are you obsessive about follow-through, responsiveness, and keeping pipelines moving?



Do you take pride in placing the right people, not just filling seats?



Do you thrive in fast-paced environments where ownership, urgency, and precision matter?



Final question: when faced with a challenge, do you get excited or run away?



If that sounds like you, you may be the perfect fit for our Recruiter role.



At Crisp, we're on a mission to help 10,000 law firms each grow their revenue by $10,000,000 over the next 10 years, creating a $10 billion impact in the legal industry.



This role is part of an internal and client-facing recruiting service that directly impacts our clients’ ability to grow. You will own full-cycle recruitment for both Crisp internal roles and law firm client roles, ensuring speed, quality, and candidate experience without sacrificing rigor.



This is an execution-heavy role. It requires extreme attention to detail, strong communication, disciplined pipeline management, and the ability to independently drive roles from intake through hire.



** IMPORTANT: TO APPLY **



You will be evaluated and vetted based on your ability to follow instructions:



Follow the following Willo link (recorded interview platform), and answer the few questions on there, first: 
/invite/OndshR/



Then reply to the ad, stating you’ve completed the Willo, and we will be in touch.



Key Responsibilities Include:



1) Full-Cycle Recruitment Ownership

Own 6+ active requisitions at any given time across internal Crisp roles and client law firm roles.

Drive roles end-to-end: intake ? sourcing ? screening ? testing ? submission ? hire.

Achieve a minimum of 4 unique hires per month, with additional performance metrics adjusted based on business needs.

Move candidates into active pipelines within 48 hours of role intake.

Target a 21-day time-to-fill for most roles.



2) Intake, Screening & Candidate Evaluation

Conduct role intake meetings with internal stakeholders and, where appropriate, law firm clients.

Calendar and conduct high-volume phone screens (20+ per week).

Evaluate candidates against role requirements using comparative analysis across experience, skills, compensation expectations, and cultural fit.

Confidently communicate role expectations, compensation ranges, and value propositions to candidates.



3) Pipeline Management & Candidate Experience

Keep candidates warm, responsive, and engaged throughout the process.

Send, track, and follow up on test assignments and assessments.

Ensure candidates move immediately through pipeline stages as steps are completed.

Balance advocacy for candidates with stewardship for Crisp and its clients.



4) Systems, Reporting & Accuracy

Maintain absolute accuracy in the ATS and supporting systems (stages, notes, statuses, documentation).

Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly reports on submissions, interviews, confirmations, and placements.

Partner with Recruiting Operations to ensure all required paperwork and compliance steps are completed on time.

Handle high-volume data entry and updates with zero tolerance for preventable errors.



5) Stakeholder Communication & Coordination

Liaise with Sourcers, other Recruiters, Team Lead Recruiters, the Director of Recruiting, and Recruiting Operations.

Navigate scheduling and availability across candidates, internal teams, and external clients.

Surface risks early when roles are at risk of delay or breakdown.



6) Tools and Platforms You’ll Use

(You do not need deep expertise in all tools on day one, but you must demonstrate fast learning and comfort operating in systems.)

ATS: Greenhouse

Sourcing: LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed, Onlinejobs.ph

Scheduling: Calendly

Docs & Collaboration: Google Workspace

Communication: Slack, Zoom,

Tracking & Reporting: Google Sheets



Our requirements are pretty straightforward. To qualify you must:



Have 4+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience, up to executive-level roles.

Demonstrate strong intake ownership and the ability to deeply understand role and client needs.

Be highly detail-oriented. You catch errors other people miss.

Operate with urgency and accountability without needing reminders.

Communicate clearly, professionally, and confidently with candidates and stakeholders.

Be comfortable managing high volume without losing quality or accuracy.

Understand recruiting-related employment practices (W2 vs 1099, confidentiality, basic labor law concepts).

Be available to work full-time during U.S. Eastern Time business hours.



This role is not a fit if you:



Need constant oversight to move work forward

Avoid difficult conversations with candidates or stakeholders

Struggle to manage multiple open roles simultaneously

Miss details that damage candidate trust or client confidence



Why Our Work Matters:



Lawyers go to law school to learn how to practice law, but law school doesn’t teach them how to run a business. In a world where the best cases often go to the best marketers, legal expertise alone isn’t enough.



That’s where Crisp comes in.



We partner with committed, growth-minded law firms that care deeply about their teams, clients, and communities. Often, it’s a David vs. Goliath scenario, where the most dedicated attorneys lack the resources of their larger competitors.



Our work levels the playing field by giving law firms access to world-class marketing execution that helps them stand out, build authority, and grow sustainably.



About Crisp:



Crisp has been recognized on the Inc. 5000 (Fastest Growing Private Companies in the U.S. – 2024, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017), as well as Atlanta's Top 100 Fastest Growing Private Companies (2025, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017, 2016) and Atlanta's Best Places to Work (2024, 2023, 2022).



Crisp (www.crisp.co) is the nation’s fastest-growing law firm growth company. We’ve helped thousands of attorneys — from solo and small firms to large practices — build their brand, differentiate themselves from competitors, attract better cases, and earn millions in new revenue.



Crisp has been featured in Forbes, Inc., Avvo, ABA Journal, The Trial Lawyer, Huffington Post, and The Wall Street Journal.



OUR BOOK:



The Game Changing Attorney (available on Amazon and Barnes & Noble)





OUR PODCAST:



The Game Changing Attorney Podcast

crisp.co/podcast/



Why You Should Work Here:



You will work inside a highly structured, high-accountability recruiting operation.

You will be trusted with meaningful ownership and real responsibility.

You will directly impact client and internal team success through hiring.

You will work with leaders who value precision, urgency, and execution excellence.

This is not a role for someone looking for easy work or loose expectations. It is a role for someone who takes pride in doing things the right way, every time.



** IMPORTANT: TO APPLY **



You will be evaluated and vetted based on your ability to follow instructions:



Follow the following Willo link (recorded interview platform), and answer the few questions on there, first: 
/invite/OndshR/



Then reply to the ad, stating you’ve completed the Willo, and we will be in touch.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Remote Accounting Assistant / Bookkeeper
description:
We are an Australian-based company operating in the accounting and finance industry. We are currently looking for a dedicated, reliable, and long-term professional to join our growing team. This is a full-time remote position, ideal for someone who wants stability, professional growth, and the opportunity to work with an Australian accounting business.



We are looking for someone dynamic, organised, detail-oriented, and able to work under pressure. The ideal candidate must have a good understanding of accounting, bookkeeping, reconciliations, and administrative tasks. A degree or background in Accounting is highly preferred. Experience using Xero is a strong advantage, and good knowledge of Excel is required.



About the Role



The successful candidate will assist with:



Bookkeeping and accounting support

Bank reconciliations in Xero

Accounts payable and accounts receivable

Data entry and document organisation

BAS preparation support

Payroll support

Preparing reports and spreadsheets

General administrative tasks

Communicating with the team and clients when required



Skills We Are Looking For



Experience with Xero

Strong Excel skills

Accounting or bookkeeping knowledge

Good English communication skills

High attention to detail

Ability to meet deadlines

Ability to work under pressure

Reliable, professional, and proactive attitude

Accounting degree or accounting background is a plus

Experience with Australian accounting is a strong advantage



Position Details



Remote position

Full-time role

40 hours per week

Long-term position

Hourly rate to be discussed based on experience

Please provide your expected hourly rate in Australian dollars per hour



How to Apply



We will only consider applications that follow the instructions below. If you do not apply correctly, your application will not be considered.



Please send the following:



A voice recording/audio explaining why you are the right person for this specific position.

The audio can be sent through any platform, but it must be about this accounting role, not a general job application.

Your WhatsApp number or WhatsApp link, so we can click and contact you directly.

A list of your main skills, especially related to accounting, bookkeeping, Xero, Excel, BAS, reconciliations, payroll, and admin tasks.

Your expected hourly rate in Australian dollars per hour.



We are looking for someone serious, professional, and interested in a long-term opportunity with our company.

title: EXPERIENCED Image/Video ads creator
description:
We are looking for a EXPERIENCED Creative Content Creator for ads to join our Beauty & Health ecommerce team.



Experience with tools like Canva, Veed, or CapCut & AI image/video generation is a must. 



What you’ll do:



- Create and edit ads (photo + video) 

- Adapt and tweak content from other markets so it perfectly fits our audience.

- Collaborate with us and use our prompts & resources to make your work easier.



Put Banana in your response

title: Junior Customer Support Assistant - Work Directly With Founder | Growth Role
description:
I'm the founder of a growing Danish e-commerce company, and I'm looking for someone to own our customer experience.

You'll start by handling customer messages, solving problems, and making sure every customer feels taken care of. But here's the thing: I don't want you doing the same tasks manually forever.

Once you've learned the role, I'll personally teach you how to use AI tools to automate the repetitive parts of your job. The goal? You build yourself out of the boring stuff and into more valuable work.

In 6 months, you won't just be "doing support" - you'll be the person who built the system that handles it.

You'll start with:



Answering customer
s and messages across our brands

Solving order issues, returns, and questions

Coordinating with our logistics and operations team

Keeping our help desk organized and response times fast



Then you'll grow into:



Using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, automations) to handle repetitive inquiries automatically (we will learn you how)

Building templates, workflows, and systems that scale

Taking ownership of the full customer experience



You are:



Fluent in English, written and spoken. This is the only hard requirement.

Naturally helpful. You actually care about solving people's problems.

Proactive. "I fixed it" beats "what should I do?" every time.

Detail-oriented. You catch the small things others miss.

Curious about AI and automation, no experience needed, just genuine interest.



No experience required. Attitude is everything.

Some overlap with European daytime hours is needed, but we're flexible on exactly when.

How to Apply

Stand out by completing all three steps:



Loom video (2-3 min max). Introduce yourself in English. Tell me what you enjoy outside of work, and why this role excites you. Don't use a script - we want to hear you, not a rehearsed pitch. Google Drive video links work too.

Tony Robbins DISC profile. Take it free at 
/disc. Share your PDF result as a Google Drive link (set to "anyone with link can view").

Include the word UNICORN in the Subject line of your application. Not in the body, in the Subject line. This tells me you've read everything.



Applications missing any of these three steps will be archived without review.

title: Virtual Assistant (VA) – Phone & Admin Support (UK-Based Business)
description:
Virtual Assistant (VA) – Phone & Admin Support (UK-Based Business)



We are currently looking to hire 2 Virtual Assistants to join our growing team on a long-term, permanent basis.





---



*Role Overview*



This role involves handling inbound calls,
s, and general administrative tasks for a UK-based removals company. You will be the first point of contact for customers, so professionalism and strong communication skills are essential.





---



*Key Responsibilities*



Answer incoming phone calls in a professional and engaging manner



Respond to customer
s promptly and accurately



Handle enquiries and assist with bookings



Take deposits and update booking details



Carry out general admin tasks



Follow internal processes and maintain accurate records







---



*Requirements*



Fluent English (UK standard) – clear, confident speaking required



Strong phone manner – friendly, professional, and engaging



Previous experience in customer service / VA role preferred



Ability to work in UK time zone (GMT/BST)



Reliable internet connection and quiet working environment



Good organisational skills and attention to detail







---



*Working Hours*



Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (UK time)



Weekend availability: Reduced hours (if required)







---



*Salary & Benefits*



Competitive base salary (negotiable)



Performance-based bonuses & incentives



Opportunity for long-term, stable employment



Growth within the company







---



*Important Information*



We are hiring 2 VAs only



Closing date: Friday, 24th April



We are looking to finalise hires ASAP







---



*How to Apply*



Please apply with:



A short introduction



Your experience



Your availability





*Important:*

Please also send a voice recording via WhatsApp to 
introducing yourself. This is required as part of the application process.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!
