title: Junior Operations & Logistics Assistant - Right Hand to the Founder
description:
I'm the founder of a growing Danish e-commerce company, and I need someone to help me run the operational backbone of the business.

You'll start by managing inventory, coordinating with suppliers and our 3PL warehouse, and keeping our supply chain running smoothly. But this isn't a "just follow the checklist" role.

Once you know the operations inside out, I'll personally train you to automate the repetitive parts using AI. The goal is to build systems so good that the boring stuff runs itself, and you move into higher-level work.

You'll start with:



Monitoring inventory levels and reorder timing across our brands

Coordinating with suppliers, freight forwarders, and our 3PL warehouse

Tracking shipments and solving logistics issues before they become problems

Keeping spreadsheets, dashboards, and data accurate and up to date



Then you'll grow into:



Using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, automations) to automate inventory monitoring, alerts, and reporting

Building operational systems and workflows that scale

Taking ownership of the full supply chain, from supplier to customer's door



You are:



Fluent in English, written and spoken. This is the only hard requirement.

Organized. You love structure, spreadsheets, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

Proactive. You spot a problem and fix it before anyone else notices.

Numbers-oriented. Data and accuracy come naturally to you.

Curious about AI and automation, no experience needed, just genuine interest.



No experience required. Attitude is everything.

Some overlap with European daytime hours is needed, but we're flexible on exactly when.

How to Apply

Stand out by completing all three steps:



Loom video (2-3 min max). Introduce yourself in English. Tell me what you enjoy outside of work, and why this role excites you. Don't use a script - we want to hear you, not a rehearsed pitch. Google Drive video links work too.

Tony Robbins DISC profile. Take it free at 
/disc. Share your PDF result as a Google Drive link (set to "anyone with link can view").

Include the word UNICORN in the Subject line of your application. Not in the body, in the Subject line. This tells me you've read everything.

title: Marketing & Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Exclusively support our brand in generating qualified leads for group coaching programmes through strategic digital marketing,
 campaigns, audience engagement, and podcast coordination activities - including scheduling guests for the brand podcast and securing podcast appearances for the founder.



Key Responsibilities

1.
 Marketing & Lead Nurture

o Plan and execute
 marketing campaigns using Brevo.

o Utilise existing funnels and automations to drive conversions.

o Maintain and segment
 lists for improved performance.

o Create, schedule, and review
 sequences to nurture and re-engage leads.



2. Lead Generation & Digital Marketing

o Implement strategies to convert existing social media and online followers into leads.

o Monitor and optimise lead magnet funnel performance (WordPress + Brevo).

o Repurpose content across platforms to drive visibility and enquiries.

o Track marketing performance and recommend improvements.



3. Audience Engagement & Community Building

o Respond to inbound enquiries, comments, and DMs, nurturing warm leads.

o Encourage sign-ups to mailing lists, webinars, or group coaching offers.

o Maintain consistent brand tone and messaging.



4. Podcast Guest & Host Scheduling Coordination

o Podcast: Research suitable guests, conduct outreach, schedule interviews, and coordinate materials.

o Founder Guest Appearances: research fitting podcasts, send pitches, manage booking communication, and prepare bios/speaking points where needed.



5. General Admin & Reporting

o Keep organised tracking of leads, outreach, and campaign performance.

o Provide a weekly summary report outlining progress and next steps.



Required Skills & Experience

• Previous experience in Virtual Assistance, Marketing Support, or Lead Generation.

• Proficiency with Brevo, WordPress, and social media platforms (Instagram,
, Tiktok, etc).

• Strong written communication and outreach skills.

• Understanding of digital marketing funnels and lead magnets.

• Highly organised, proactive, and able to work independently and confidentially.



Preferred

• Experience working with coaching, wellbeing, or personal development brands.

• Experience coordinating podcast interviews and outreach.

• Basic content editing or graphic design skills.



Working Arrangement

• Remote, part-time role (10-12 hours a week starting 9:00 AM UK Time)

• Weekly check-in call and ongoing communication via
/Slack/WhatsApp.

• Potential to expand hours based on results and growth.

title: PR Campaign Administrator
description:
Are you organised, media-savvy, and curious about how brands and personalities get featured in the press? We’re looking for a PR Campaign Administrator to ensure our brand and key personalities stay on the radar of journalists through consistent outreach, smart use of PR platforms, and performance tracking.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys research, systems, and behind-the-scenes execution in PR and personal branding.



Work Schedule:

Remote, part-time or full-time

(Availability to work with UK time zones is required)



Duties and Responsibilities:



PR Platform Management:

Research, sign up for, and manage PR tools and journalist platforms (e.g. HARO, Qwoted, Featured, Muck Rack, PressPlugs, Roxhill, etc.). Monitor daily opportunities and submit relevant pitches on behalf of the brand or personality.



Journalist Outreach & Relationship Building:

Identify relevant journalists, publications, podcasts, and media outlets. Maintain an organised database of contacts and manage consistent, professional outreach.



Campaign Coordination:

Support PR campaigns by tracking submissions, follow-ups, responses, and media wins. Ensure deadlines are met and pitches align with brand positioning.



Performance Tracking & Reporting:

Monitor PR activity performance (placements, backlinks, mentions, reach). Create simple reports showing what’s working, what’s not, and opportunities to improve visibility.



Research & Brand Positioning:

Research trends, media angles, and journalist interests to help position the brand or personality as a credible expert in their space.



Qualifications:



Experience in PR, communications, journalism, or personal branding is a plus



Familiarity with PR tools, media databases, or journalist request platforms (or strong ability to learn quickly)



Excellent written English (C1–C2) with strong attention to tone and detail



Highly organised, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple campaigns



Tech-savvy and confident using spreadsheets, CRMs, and online research tools



Comfortable working remotely and independently



This is a remote, part-time or full-time role, with rate dependent on experience and clear opportunities to grow into a senior PR or brand visibility role.



To apply, please send a short video introduction through the messages on this platform, explaining your experience (or interest) in PR and how you would help keep a brand visible to journalists.

title: Lead Generation Administrator
description:
Are you highly detail-oriented, analytical, and comfortable working with data and research tools? We’re looking for a Lead Generation Administrator to support our recruitment consultants by building high-quality company and contact lists using PitchBook, LinkedIn, and leading lead-gen platforms.



This role is critical to ensuring our
 marketing and outreach campaigns are targeted, accurate, and effective.



Work Schedule:

Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM UK time (remote)



Duties and Responsibilities:



Company & Lead Research:

Use PitchBook to filter and identify companies based on specific demographics such as industry, size, revenue, funding stage, geography, and ownership structure.



Data Enrichment & Validation:

Research and enrich company and contact data by sourcing LinkedIn URLs,
 addresses, and phone numbers using platforms such as Apollo, ZoomInfo, Cognism, and similar tools.



List Building & Management:

Create and maintain clean, well-structured lead lists for
 marketing and recruiter outreach. Ensure data accuracy and compliance with internal standards.



LinkedIn Research:

Identify key decision-makers within target companies and link company data to relevant LinkedIn profiles.



Consultant Coordination:

Work closely with a dedicated Recruitment Consultant to align on target criteria, provide progress updates, and refine lead searches based on feedback.



Administrative & Ad Hoc Support:

Assist with additional recruitment administration tasks as required, including reporting, data cleanup, and general operational support.



Qualifications:



Previous experience in lead generation, recruitment support, or research roles is highly preferred



Strong hands-on experience with PitchBook and LinkedIn



Familiarity with lead generation tools such as Apollo, ZoomInfo, Cognism, or similar platforms



High attention to detail with strong data-handling skills



Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook) and Google Workspace



Comfortable working with UK clients and familiar with British English



English level C1–C2 (written and spoken)



Organised, proactive, and able to manage multiple tasks independently



This is a remote, full-time role with opportunities to expand responsibilities within a growing recruitment business.



To apply, please send a short video introduction through the messages on this platform, outlining your experience with PitchBook, LinkedIn, and lead generation tools.

title: LinkedIn Recruiter
description:
Are you proactive, detail-oriented, and confident using LinkedIn as a recruitment tool? We’re looking for a LinkedIn Recruiter to support our consultants by sourcing, engaging, and qualifying high-quality candidates through LinkedIn and other platforms.



Work Schedule:

Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM UK time (remote)



Duties and Responsibilities:



Candidate Sourcing & Outreach:

Use LinkedIn Recruiter and personal LinkedIn to identify, research, and approach suitable candidates for live roles. Send personalised outreach messages and manage follow-ups.



Pipeline Management:

Maintain accurate candidate records, track responses, and update CRM/ATS systems to ensure a clean and organised talent pipeline.



Market Research:

Conduct market mapping and talent research to support consultants with insights on candidate availability, competitor hiring, and talent trends.



Screening & Coordination:

Pre-screen candidates where required and coordinate interviews or calls with recruitment consultants. Format their CVs using the company standard format.



Qualifications:



Previous experience as a LinkedIn Recruiter or Sourcer (recruitment agency experience is a plus)



Strong experience using LinkedIn Recruiter and LinkedIn for candidate sourcing



Comfortable working with UK clients and familiar with British English



English level C1–C2 (spoken and written)



Highly organised, detail-oriented, and results-driven



Tech-savvy and comfortable using CRMs, spreadsheets, and modern recruitment tools



This is a remote, full-time role with opportunities to grow within a fast-paced recruitment business. Please apply by sending us a short video introduction through the messages here on this platform.

title: Operations Manager - (Pathway to Director of Operations)
description:
About the Company 

Nelson Finance Life LLC (NFL) is a U.S.-based financial consulting and government compliance firm focused on helping businesses navigate complex regulations while building long-term financial stability. We operate in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment and are building systems to scale across compliance consulting, financial services, and government contracting.



About the Role

The CEO will be transitioning into law school in August 2026. This role is critical in helping the company scale by taking ownership of day-to-day operations and building systems that allow the business to run efficiently without constant oversight. This is not a support role. This is a leadership role for someone who wants to grow into a Director of Operations. and take ownership of execution. You will act as the operational bridge between the CEO and the team, ensuring all work is executed efficiently without requiring constant CEO involvement.



Responsibilities

- Manage daily operations and workflows across compliance, proposals, and internal operations.

- Build and document SOPs across all core business functions.

- Implement systems using tools like 
, Google Workspace, and automation platforms.

- Track deadlines, deliverables, and ensure all work is completed on time.

- Run weekly team check-ins and manage remote staff performance.

- Support proposal and revenue pipeline tracking (RFP/RFQ coordination) 

- Hire and manage interns or support staff 

- Create weekly reports and KPI dashboards for the CEO

- Ownership Expectations (Non-Negotiable)

- You are expected to take ownership of tasks and outcomes, not wait for instructions. 

- You proactively identify problems and present solutions. 

- You communicate clearly and early—no silence or delays. 

- You are comfortable making decisions with limited direction



Who You Are 

- Degree preferred but not required. A business or operations background is a plus.

- Experience in operations, startups, or remote team management 

- 5–7+ years in operations, business management, or startup scaling.

- Experience building systems, processes, and team infrastructure with limited oversight

- Strong organizational, communication, and leadership skills.

- Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to work autonomously.

- Experience with government contracting, compliance, or consulting (preferred).



Work Environment:

- Must be available and responsive during EST working hours (8:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST)

- Fully remote (Philippines-based) 

- Must have reliable internet and dual-monitor setup 

- 6-month probationary period 

- Collaborative, fast-paced, and growth-focused environment



Tech Stack 


, Google Workspace, Slack, QuickBooks, Zapier, Hubstaff, Zoom, ChatGPT, Microsoft Office



Compensation & Growth

- Base: $750/month (25 hours/week) 

- Performance-based bonuses (accuracy, timeliness, execution) 

- Additional bonuses tied to contracts and proposals won 

- Opportunity for a salary increase after 90 days based on performance 

- Clear pathway to Director of Operations with increased compensation and responsibility



Application Instructions

This Role Is NOT For You If:

- You wait for instructions instead of taking initiative.

- You struggle with deadlines or follow-through 

- You prefer constant supervision.

- You avoid problem-solving.



To apply, include the word “NFL OPERATOR” in your application subject line and answer the following questions. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.



- Send a copy of your resume, Cover letter, and 30-second audio of what you enjoy doing in your free time. 

- What would you do if you were given a task you did not fully understand? 

- How do you prioritize tasks when everything feels urgent?

- Describe a system or process you built from scratch.

title: AI Video Editor (Ecommerce)
description:
ABOUT US



We’re a rapidly scaling e-commerce company focused on producing high-performing video ads for direct-to-consumer brands across categories like health, footwear, and lifestyle.



Our team specializes in creating conversion-driven creatives at scale—and we’re expanding.



We’re currently hiring 2 AI Video Editors who can start immediately and join us within the week.



**



ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for editors who can produce highly realistic AI-generated ads that blend seamlessly with real-world footage. This role is perfect for someone who understands how to balance creativity with performance, and can consistently deliver high-volume ad variations.



You’ll be working on short-form, direct-response ads designed to convert across paid social platforms.



**



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



* Produce 20–50 AI-generated video ads per week across multiple brands.

* Generate AI avatars, UGC-style clips, and supporting visuals using modern AI tools.

* Edit all assets in CapCut with strong attention to pacing, structure, and polish.

* Research competitor creatives across platforms like Meta and Google to inspire new variations.

* Develop and test different hooks, angles, and concepts to improve performance.

* Support minor script tweaks or hook improvements when necessary (scripts are typically provided).



**



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience creating AI-generated ads for ecommerce brands.

* Hands-on experience with tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs.

* Advanced CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio of work.

* Ability to generate realistic AI visuals (people, environments, product scenes).

* Strong understanding of direct-response creative principles.

* Capable of working independently while maintaining high output.



**



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



* Familiarity with tools like Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora.

* Experience using Meta Ads Library or similar platforms for ad research.

* Background in producing UGC-style creatives for paid ads.



**



ROLE INFORMATION



* Commitment: Full-time (40 hours weekly)

* Compensation: $1,400 / month

* Schedule: Flexible working hours (Monday to Saturday)

* Location: Fully remote

* Availability: Immediate hiring for 2 positions (target onboarding: this week)



**



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To show that you’ve read the full job description, begin your application with:



AICreator492



Then answer the following:



1. Describe your step-by-step process for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style ad, starting from receiving a script up to delivering the final version in CapCut.

2. What tools do you currently use for AI video, image, and voice generation? Please include your skill level for each (beginner, intermediate, advanced).

3. What methods do you use to make AI-generated people and scenes look realistic for paid ads? How do you avoid common AI artifacts or unnatural visuals?

4. When reviewing competitor ads, what specific signals or elements do you focus on to identify high-performing creatives?

5. On average, how much time do you need to produce a fully AI-generated 25-second short-form ad from start to finish?

6. Share links to your portfolio showcasing realistic AI-generated e-commerce ads that demonstrate your ability to create high-converting content.



**



If you’re excited about pushing the limits of AI-generated video and building creatives that drive real results, we’d like to work with you.

title: Music Upload Assistant (High Volume, Simple Task, Performance-Based Pay)
description:
Job Description



You will work inside a structured Google Drive and Excel system:



Each Google Drive folder = 1 artist

Inside each artist folder ? multiple folders (each = 1 song to upload)

You will also have access to an Excel document

Your task:

Check the artist folder in Google Drive

Compare songs inside the folder with the Excel sheet

If a song is NOT listed in Excel ? upload it to the correct distribution account

After uploading ? mark it as uploaded in Excel



Each Excel file is connected to a specific distribution account and contains around 100 artists.



Workflow

Each artist should have 1 new song uploaded every Friday

Total workload:

 1,000 to 4,000 uploads per month

? Time per Task

Each upload takes approximately:

 30 seconds to 2 minutes max

Payment (Performance-Based)

Payment is based on completed uploads

Example:



6,000 SEK for 4,000 uploads

31,800 PHP total

 8 PHP per upload



Paid per completed and correctly logged upload

Opportunity to scale volume = higher earnings

 Requirements

Fast and accurate

Good attention to detail

Comfortable working with:

Google Drive

Excel / Google Sheets

Stable internet connection

Ability to follow instructions exactly

 Bonus (Preferred but not required)

Experience with:

Data entry

Uploading content

Music platforms / distribution

 Important



This is a high-volume, repetitive job.

We are looking for someone who can work efficiently and consistently over time.



Clear instructions and training will be provided.
